Psychic Fangs inflicts regular damage and destroys any Light Screen or Reflect barriers currently active on the target's side of the field.
What happens if a Pokémon holding a Power Herb uses the move Bounce?
If a Pokémon is holding a Power Herb, the move Bounce can be executed in a single turn instead of taking two turns to complete.
At what levels does Solosis evolve into its subsequent forms?
Solosis evolves into Duosion at level 32, and Duosion evolves into Reuniclus at level 41.
What is the primary effect of the move Guard Split in Pokémon?
Guard Split is a move that averages the user's Defense and Special Defense stats with the target's, effectively combining them and then distributing the total equally between both Pokémon.
What are the two ways a Magneton can evolve into Magnezone?
Magneton evolves into Magnezone when it is leveled up while in a special magnetic field or when it is exposed to a Thunder Stone.
At what level does Fidough evolve into Dachsbun?
Fidough evolves into Dachsbun at level 26.
What happens at the end of each turn when a Pokémon has the Moody ability?

When a Pokémon has the Moody ability, one of its stats is increased by two stages and another stat is decreased by one stage at the end of every turn. If a stat has already reached the maximum of six stages or the minimum of negative six stages, it will not be selected for that respective increase or decrease.
What happens to Minior when its HP drops to half or less?

When a Minior's HP drops to half or less, its Meteor Form shell breaks, revealing its Core. This change is triggered by the Shields Down Ability, which activates only when the Pokémon has 50% or less of its maximum HP.
What are the effects of the Sand Veil ability during a sandstorm?

During a sandstorm, a Pokémon with the Sand Veil ability has its evasion increased by 1.25 times and takes no damage from the sandstorm. Additionally, if the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved while in a sandstorm.
How does Leafeon obtain energy and what unique trait does its fur possess?

Leafeon's fur cells are closer in nature to plant cells, which allows the Pokémon to use photosynthesis to obtain energy while sleeping under sunlight rather than eating. Additionally, this process enables it to purify the air around it.
How should Incineroar be built to function as a specially defensive pivot in competitive play?

Incineroar should use a Sassy nature and a specially defensive EV spread to improve matchups against threats like Chandelure, Salazzle, and Roserade. Additionally, 20 Attack EVs are recommended to ensure that Knock Off OHKOes Chandelure.
What items can Tapu Koko utilize to enhance its offensive capabilities in competitive play?
Tapu Koko can utilize Choice Specs to increase its overall power, a Life Orb to reduce the need for prediction, or an Electrium Z combined with Wild Charge to leverage its higher Attack stat.
What effect does the move Cosmic Power have on a Pokémon?
Cosmic Power is a move where the user absorbs a mystical power from space to raise its Defense and Special Defense stats by one stage.
What is the name of the Pokémon described in the provided text?
The Pokémon described in the text is Delibird.
What is the primary effect of the Lightning Rod ability in Pokémon?

The Lightning Rod ability allows a Pokémon to draw in all Electric-type moves directed at other Pokémon on the field to itself, granting it immunity to those moves and boosting its Special Attack stat if hit.
What is the special effect of the move Drill Run when it is used in battle?
Drill Run inflicts regular damage, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit because the user's critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
What is the primary role of Hatterene in competitive play and why is its Magic Bounce ability significant?

Hatterene functions as a Calm Mind user for defensive teams. Its Magic Bounce ability is significant because it deflects status moves like Toxic and Thunder Wave, as well as phazing attempts, which allows it to pressure entry hazard setters.
What is the primary effect of the Shed Shell held item in Pokémon?

The Shed Shell is a held item that allows a Pokémon to switch out even if it is affected by a trapping move, a trapping Ability, or self-inflicted effects like Ingrain. However, it does not allow the holder to flee or use Teleport.
How can Zamazenta change its form from Hero of Many Battles to Crowned Shield?
Zamazenta changes its form into Crowned Shield when it is given a Rusted Shield to hold.
What are the base stats and primary ability of the Pokémon Inteleon?
Inteleon has base stats of 70 HP, 85 Attack, 65 Defense, 125 Sp. Atk, 65 Sp. Def, and 120 Speed. Its primary ability is Torrent, and its hidden ability is Sniper.
What are the base stats of the Pokémon Klefki?
Klefki has the following base stats: 57 HP, 80 Attack, 91 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 87 Special Defense, and 75 Speed.
What are the primary advantages and disadvantages of using Cofagrigus as a wall in competitive play?

Cofagrigus functions as an effective wall due to its high bulk and ability to spinblock using its Ghost typing. Its ability, Mummy, helps neutralize threats like Mega Glalie. However, it is very slow, lacks reliable recovery outside of Pain Split, and is vulnerable to Knock Off as well as Dark and Ghost-type attacks. Additionally, it faces competition from Spiritomb and Jellicent and is easily worn down by hazards and status.
What is the primary role of Landorus in the Ubers metagame, and which moves allow it to function effectively?

Landorus serves as a potent wallbreaker in the Ubers metagame due to its Sheer Force ability, Life Orb, and high Special Attack. It uses Earth Power as its main STAB move, Rock Slide for coverage against Flying-types, Knock Off to remove items like Heavy-Duty Boots, and Sludge Wave to check Xerneas. It can also utilize Superpower against special walls like Blissey and Ferrothorn, or Explosion on hyper offense teams.
How does the Rock Head ability affect recoil damage in battle?

The Rock Head ability protects the Pokémon from recoil damage caused by its moves. However, it does not prevent recoil damage from the move Struggle, nor does it prevent crash damage resulting from missing with Jump Kick or High Jump Kick.
At what level does Carvanha evolve into Sharpedo?
Carvanha evolves into Sharpedo at level 30.
What happens when a Pokémon uses the move Brick Break?

When a Pokémon uses Brick Break, it attacks with a swift chop or tough fists to inflict regular damage while simultaneously destroying any Light Screen or Reflect barriers on the target's side of the field.
At what levels does Blipbug evolve into its next forms?
Blipbug evolves into Dottler at level 10 and then into Orbeetle at level 30.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokemon Honchkrow?
Honchkrow has the following base stats: HP 100, Attack 125, Defense 52, Sp. Atk 105, Sp. Def 52, and Speed 71. Its primary abilities are Insomnia and Super Luck, while its hidden ability is Moxie.
What is unique about the Ability Mycelium Might in relation to Toedscool?
Toedscool and its evolution, Toedscruel, are the only known Pokémon that can have the Ability Mycelium Might.
At what level does Kabuto evolve into Kabutops?
Kabuto evolves into Kabutops at level 40.
What is the function of the DNA Splicers item?
The DNA Splicers is an item used to fuse Kyurem with a certain Pokémon, based on the legend that they were once one.
What makes Swanna a threatening Pokémon in the NU tier when it is raining?

In rain, Swanna becomes a powerhouse because of her access to the move Hurricane. Her great Speed of 98 allows her to outspeed common NU threats like Gardevoir and Braviary, while her Hydration ability synergizes effectively with the move Rest.
What are some of the main drawbacks or counters to Toxapex in competitive play?

Toxapex is hindered by its low speed and lack of significant offensive damage. It is vulnerable to powerful wallbreakers like Landorus-T, Mega Swampert, Excadrill, Tapu Lele, Mega Medicham, and Kyurem-B. Furthermore, it struggles to stop threats such as Mega Alakazam, Swords Dance Gliscor, and defensive Heatran, which can easily find entry opportunities against it.
How does the Guts ability affect a Pokémon's Attack stat when it is afflicted with a non-volatile status condition?
When a Pokémon with the Guts ability is afflicted with a non-volatile status condition, its Attack is increased by 50%. Additionally, the Pokémon does not suffer any Attack reduction due to a burn.
How strong is the thread that Tarountula secretes?
Tarountula's thread is elastic and as strong as wire, which allows the Pokémon to deflect attacks from its natural enemy, Scyther.
What is the specific effect of using a Rash Mint on a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon smells a Rash Mint, its Sp. Atk will grow more easily, while its Sp. Def will grow more slowly.
What is the strategic benefit of using Tera Poison on Wo-Chien in competitive play?

Tera Poison provides Wo-Chien with resistances to attacks like Koraidon's Low Kick, Zacian-C's Play Rough, Miraidon's Dazzling Gleam, and common U-turn users like Landorus-T, Koraidon, and Miraidon. It also grants immunity to Toxic and allows Wo-Chien to absorb Toxic Spikes. However, it also introduces weaknesses to Ground-type moves from Arceus-Ground and Psychic-type moves from Calyrex-S.
What should I do with a Root Fossil to obtain a Pokémon?
You can take a Root Fossil to a scientist at the mining museum in Oreburgh City or the Museum of Science in Pewter City to receive a Lileep.
What is the primary effect of the Arena Trap ability in Pokémon?
The Arena Trap ability prevents opposing Pokémon from fleeing or being switched out of battle.
How does Spectrier utilize its Ghost-typing and Will-O-Wisp to counter Yveltal in competitive play?

Spectrier's pure Ghost-typing and access to Will-O-Wisp allow it to utilize Substitute effectively against Yveltal. When Yveltal is burned, Spectrier's Substitute will not be broken by Foul Play or U-turn, effectively making the Yveltal setup fodder for Spectrier to use Nasty Plot.
What is the criteria for a Pokémon to be officially designated as OU in the SM format?

A Pokémon is designated as OU in the SM format if it makes up at least approximately 3.41% of total weighted usage in the tier. This percentage represents a threshold where a typical competitive player is more than 50% likely to encounter that Pokémon at least once in 20 battles.
What is the effect of TR26 in Pokémon?
TR26 is a Pokémon item that allows the user to endure any attack with at least 1 HP. However, its chance of failing increases if the item is used in succession.
How does Meltan evolve into Melmetal in Pokémon GO?
In Pokémon GO, Meltan evolves into Melmetal when the player uses 400 Meltan Candy.
What is the primary effect of the Bulletproof ability in Pokémon?
The Bulletproof ability makes the Pokémon possessing it immune to all ball and bomb-based moves.
At what levels does Grookey evolve into its subsequent forms?
Grookey evolves into Thwackey at level 16, and Thwackey evolves into Rillaboom at level 35.
What is the XY Uber format and how does it relate to other Smogon tiers?

The XY Ubers tier is Smogon's most inclusive tier, permitting the use of any Pokémon species while banning only specific uncompetitive abilities and tactics. It operates independently, meaning its tiering is not influenced by usage in OU, UU, RU, NU, or PU, nor does it impact the composition of those tiers.
What is the primary role of Ribombee in the RU tier and which items and abilities help it perform this job?

Ribombee serves as a powerful Sticky Web setter on hyper offense teams in the RU tier. To reliably set up, it utilizes the Focus Sash item to survive hits and the Shield Dust ability to ignore secondary effects like flinching from moves such as Iron Head. Its high Speed allows it to reliably set Sticky Web to support slow wallbreakers like Gallade, Armarouge, and Feraligatr.
How does the Propeller Tail ability affect a Pokémon's moves in battle?
The Propeller Tail ability allows the Pokémon's moves to ignore the effects of any opposing Pokémon's Abilities that would otherwise redirect or draw in those moves.
What is the name of the move described in the text?
The move described in the text is Thunderclap.
What are the base stats of the Bivalve Pokémon, Cloyster?
Cloyster has the following base stats: HP 50, Attack 95, Defense 180, Sp. Atk 85, Sp. Def 45, and Speed 70.
What kind of move is Breakneck Blitz, and what is its effect?

Breakneck Blitz is a Physical Pokémon move that inflicts regular damage. It works by the user building up momentum with Z-Power to crash into the target at full speed. The move's power varies depending on the original move used.
What is the primary effect of the move Dynamax Cannon when the target is Dynamaxed?
Dynamax Cannon inflicts regular damage, and it deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.
What is the effect of holding a Pure Incense when placed at the head of your party?
When held by the lead Pokémon in your party, Pure Incense prevents wild battles with Pokémon that are at a lower level than the holder.
What is the function of the Tart Apple item?
The Tart Apple is a peculiar, exceptionally tart item that can be used to evolve a certain species of Pokémon.
What is the primary function of a Grass Tera Shard and where can you use it?
A Grass Tera Shard is used to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Grass. You can perform this process by taking 50 Grass Tera Shards to the Treasure Eatery located in Medali.
What is the primary role and team strategy for Polteageist in competitive SV?

Polteageist serves as a setup sweeper on niche Psychic Terrain hyper offense teams. It utilizes Shell Smash and its Weak Armor ability to outspeed foes and boost its Stored Power, often holding a Focus Sash to survive hits. Essential teammates include Indeedee-M, which provides Psychic Surge to power up Stored Power and block priority moves, and other offensive Psychic-types like Iron Crown and Deoxys-S that help apply pressure and break through shared checks.
What primary ability makes Tapu Lele a potent wallbreaker in OU, and what are its main drawbacks?

Tapu Lele's Psychic Surge ability automatically sets Psychic Terrain, which boosts its Psychic-type attacks and protects grounded Pokemon from priority moves. However, it struggles against bulky Steel-types like Magearna and Celesteela that resist its STAB attacks. Additionally, its average physical bulk and mediocre Speed make it vulnerable to revenge killing, and its coverage moves against checks are often inconsistent.
How does the Item Drop item affect a friendly Pokémon during battle?
When used on a friendly Pokémon in battle, Item Drop selects another random friendly Pokémon and removes its held item for the remainder of the battle.
What is the Relic Statue item in the Pokémon games?
The Relic Statue is an item described as cult vendor trash. It is a stone figurine created by an ancient civilization approximately 3,000 years ago, and it can be sold to a maniac for a high price.
At what level does a Ledyba evolve into a Ledian?
A Ledyba evolves into a Ledian at level 18.
How is the base power of the Dark-type move Power Trip calculated?

Power Trip has a normal base power of 20, which increases by 20 for every increased stat stage the user possesses. Stats decreased below normal do not affect the base power, and it can reach a maximum base power of 860 when all seven of the user's stats have been raised by the maximum of six stages.
What is the Mega Pendant in the game Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire?

The Mega Pendant is an unused Pokémon item that serves as Wally's Key Stone in Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It cannot be obtained by the player, but it contains an untold power that allows Pokémon carrying a Mega Stone to Mega Evolve during battle.
What is the primary role of Stoutland and what moveset item allows it to function effectively as a wallbreaker?

Stoutland serves as an amazing wallbreaker due to its base 110 Attack and access to the Scrappy ability, which lets it hit Ghost-types with Return. To function effectively in this role, it uses a Choice Band to maximize its damage output, allowing it to pressure walls like Clefairy and Audino. Key coverage moves include Superpower for Rock- and Steel-types, Pursuit for foes switching out, and Facade to remain threatening if burned.
At what levels do Oshawott and Dewott evolve in their evolution chain?
Oshawott evolves into Dewott at level 17, and Dewott evolves into Samurott at level 36.
What is the function of the cream fur on a Lillipup's face?
Lillipup's facial fur is used as a radar to gain information about its surroundings and to check the condition of its opponents.
What items and moves are recommended for Meowscarada, and what is its role in competitive play?

Meowscarada functions as an offensive pivot that relies on Heavy-Duty Boots to handle entry hazards. Its recommended moves include Knock Off for utility and item removal, Flower Trick for guaranteed critical hits to bypass defense boosts, Triple Axel for Ice-type coverage, and U-turn for momentum. It is best used on balance teams to provide hazard chip and pressure opponents.
What is the move Veevee Volley?
Veevee Volley is a move in the Pokémon series.
Why is Haxorus often considered outclassed by other Dragon-types in the BW competitive tier?

Haxorus is outclassed because other Dragon-types like Garchomp, Dragonite, Salamence, and Kyurem-B are either faster or stronger. Additionally, these alternatives offer better defensive presence due to superior bulk and typing, whereas Haxorus has a meager defensive profile and middling Speed, making it easily revenge killed.
What are the base stats of the Pokémon Murkrow?
Murkrow has the following base stats: 60 HP, 85 Attack, 42 Defense, 85 Sp. Atk, 42 Sp. Def, and 91 Speed.
How does the weight of a wild Pokémon affect the catch rate when using a Heavy Ball?

The catch rate modification depends on the Pokémon's weight: it increases by 40 if the Pokémon weighs 409.6 kg or more, by 30 if it weighs 307.2 kg or more, and by 20 if it weighs 204.8 kg or more. If the Pokémon weighs less than 204.8 kg, the catch rate is 20 less than normal.
What are the primary utility moves for Tapu Fini and how do they function in its defensive role?

Tapu Fini's primary utility moves include Defog and Taunt. Defog allows it to clear entry hazards from threats like Heatran and Ash-Greninja. Taunt is used to pester defensive Pokemon such as Chansey and Toxapex, while also helping to prevent the setup of entry hazards.
What effect does the Mild Mint item have on a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon smells a Mild Mint, its Sp. Atk will grow more easily, while its Defense will grow more slowly.
What are the primary abilities of the Pokemon Marill and at what level does it evolve into Azumarill?
Marill's primary abilities are Thick Fat and Huge Power, with Sap Sipper as its hidden ability. It evolves into Azumarill at level 18.
What is the primary effect of the move Crunch?
Crunch is a damage-dealing Dark-type move that has a 20% chance to lower the target's Defense stat by one stage.
What is the recommended item strategy for Shiinotic, and why is it used?

Shiinotic is often run with no item to avoid the move Poltergeist from Trevenant and Gourgeist formes. Alternatively, a Rocky Helmet can be equipped to punish opponents that rely on contact moves, such as Gurdurr and Kangaskhan.
What is Inteleon's recommended competitive moveset and role in the NU tier?

Inteleon acts as a powerful special attacker in NU, typically using Choice Specs to maximize its Special Attack. Its preferred moveset includes Hydro Pump (or Surf for better accuracy), Ice Beam for Grass- and Dragon-types, Dark Pulse for coverage against Water-types, and U-turn to maintain momentum and pivot against Water-immune Pokémon like Gastrodon and Vaporeon. Air Slash is also an optional coverage move to target Toxicroak and Paldean Tauros-W.
What is the purpose of Ketchup in Generation IX Pokémon games?
Ketchup is an ingredient introduced in Generation IX that is used for making sandwiches.
What is the effect of the move Ruination?
Ruination is a move that summons a ruinous disaster, which results in cutting the target's current HP in half.
How does Arctozolt's nature influence its performance in a competitive setting?

A Naughty nature allows Arctozolt to OHKO Physically Defensive Toxapex with Bolt Beak after Stealth Rock damage, while a Naive nature enables it to outspeed Zeraora and Choice Scarf Excadrill under Snow, making Stomping Tantrum a better move choice.
At what levels does Vanillite evolve into its subsequent forms?
Vanillite evolves into Vanillish at level 35, and Vanillish evolves into Vanilluxe at level 47.
How does the Ability Plus affect a Pokémon's stats during a battle?
When a Pokémon with the Ability Plus enters a battle and has an ally with the Ability Plus or Minus, the Pokémon's Special Attack stat is increased by 50%.
Why is Dedenne considered outclassed as a competitive Electric-type in the SM tier?

Dedenne is considered outclassed due to its sparse movepool, poor stats outside of Speed, and terrible bulk. Its only boosting method, the Petaya Berry + Recycle combination, is slow and ineffective. Other Electric-types like Alolan Raichu offer superior offensive stats, access to Nasty Plot, and better coverage, making them more consistent sweepers.
What is the primary function of the Rainbow Pass in Generation III?

The Rainbow Pass is a Key Item that allows the player to travel between the port in Vermilion City and the Sevii Islands using the Seagallop ferries. While the Tri-Pass grants access to islands one through three, obtaining the Rainbow Pass adds access to islands four through seven.
What is the primary effect of the Roto Friendship item in Pokémon?
Roto Friendship is a Rotom Power that helps the Pokémon in your party increase their friendship levels at a faster rate.
What are some of Jellicent's common defensive and offensive roles in the PU tier?

Jellicent serves as a defensive pivot that can check threats like Primeape and Alolan Sandslash using moves like Recover and Will-O-Wisp to stay healthy and cripple opponents. Offensively, it can function as a wallbreaker or late-game sweeper by utilizing Choice Specs or Trick Room sets, which leverage its powerful Water Spout and strong STAB coverage.
How much HP does Moomoo Milk restore when used on a Pokémon?
Moomoo Milk is a highly nutritious item that restores 100 HP to a single Pokémon when consumed.
How is a Pokémon officially designated as OU in Smogon's competitive tiering system?

A Pokémon is designated as OU if it accounts for at least approximately 4.52% of the total weighted usage within the tier. This threshold ensures that a typical competitive player is more than 50% likely to encounter that Pokémon at least once in 15 battles.
What is the scope of the Ubers format in the SV generation?
Ubers is Smogon's most inclusive tier, designed to allow the use of as many Pokémon as competitively possible. It operates independently of usage statistics from OU, UU, RU, NU, or PU tiers.
What is the potential secondary effect of the move Constrict?
The move Constrict inflicts regular damage and has a potential chance to lower the target's Speed stat by one stage.
What is the specific requirement for Electabuzz to evolve into Electivire in most games?
In most games, Electabuzz evolves into Electivire when traded while holding an Electirizer.
What is the evolution chain for Linoone and at what level does it evolve into Obstagoon?
Linoone is part of an evolution chain that starts with Zigzagoon, which evolves into Linoone at level 20. Linoone then evolves into Obstagoon at level 35.
What is the primary benefit of running the Calm Mind and Acid Armor combination on an Alcremie set?

The combination of Calm Mind and Acid Armor significantly boosts Alcremie's bulk while simultaneously increasing the base power of Stored Power to incredible levels, allowing it to muscle through most stall and balance teams.
What effect does using an X Defense item have on a Pokémon during battle?
Using an X Defense item raises a Pokémon's Defense stat by one stage for the duration of the battle. The effect wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn from battle.
How does the Ability Urge item function when used in a battle?

When used on a party Pokémon during battle via the Wonder Launcher, Ability Urge selects another friendly Pokémon at random and forcibly activates its ability if that ability is normally triggered by a specific condition rather than being continuous or passive.
What is the specific requirement for evolving Inkay into Malamar starting at level 30?

Inkay evolves into Malamar starting at level 30 when leveled up while the game system is held upside-down. On the Nintendo Switch or Nintendo Switch 2, this must be performed in handheld mode with no other controllers connected, relying on the orientation of the attached Joy-Con controllers.
What is the primary effect of the move Horn Leech?
Horn Leech inflicts regular damage to the target and restores the user's HP by up to half of the damage dealt.
What is the primary purpose of a Pass Orb in Generation V games?
Pass Orbs are items used exclusively in Generation V for the purpose of purchasing Pass Powers at the Entralink.
What are some of the main weaknesses and threats that make it easy to revenge kill Braviary?
Braviary is easily revenge killed by common Electric- and Rock-type Pokémon, specifically Rotom-C, Heliolisk, Aerodactyl, and Diancie.
What behavior did Kabutops exhibit when hunting prey in the ocean?
In its ocean habitat, Kabutops would use its sharp scythes to slice its enemies and drink their internal fluids. Any remains left behind after it fed were then consumed by other Pokémon.
How does the Assault Vest item affect a Pokémon's stats and move selection in the main series games?

The Assault Vest raises the holder's Special Defense by 50%. It also prevents the holder from selecting any status moves, with the exception of Me First. If the Pokémon is forced to use status moves due to conditions like Encore or Torment, they will be forced to use Struggle instead.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokemon Heracross?
Heracross has base stats of 80 HP, 125 Attack, 75 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 95 Special Defense, and 85 Speed. Its available abilities are Swarm and Guts, and it has a hidden ability known as Moxie.
What is the Lagigaton Ball and how does it function?

The Lagigaton Ball is an item in the game that serves as an upgraded version of the Leaden Ball. It does not fly very far, but it becomes more effective to use if the target Pokémon has not yet noticed the player.
What is the recommended EV spread and held item for a Calm Mind Scream Tail to outpace Choice Scarf users?
To outpace Choice Scarf users like Flygon and Munkidori, Scream Tail should use 216 Speed EVs and the Booster Energy held item, which grants a free Speed boost upon entry.
What is the recommended EV spread and nature for a physically defensive Mudsdale?
To effectively take physical hits, Mudsdale should run 252 HP EVs, 172 Defense EVs, and an Impish nature.
What are the base stats of the Normal-type Pokémon Dunsparce?
Dunsparce has the following base stats: HP 100, Attack 70, Defense 70, Sp. Atk 65, Sp. Def 65, and Speed 45.
What is the effect of using an Impish Mint on a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon smells an Impish Mint, its Defense will grow more easily, but its Sp. Atk will grow more slowly.
At what level does Shuppet evolve into Banette and what are its base stats?
Shuppet evolves into Banette at level 37. Its base stats are HP 44, Attack 75, Defense 35, Sp. Atk 63, Sp. Def 33, and Speed 45.
What is the primary effect of the move Ice Spinner?
Ice Spinner is a damage-dealing Ice-type move that also removes the effects of any terrain currently present on the battlefield.
What is Eerie Spell?
Eerie Spell is a move mentioned in the Pokémon knowledge base.
What is the Grubby Hanky, and where is it found?
The Grubby Hanky is a Pokémon item that is a handkerchief dropped by a regular at Café Warehouse. It is noted for smelling faintly like a Pokémon.
What is the purpose of Sandshrew Candy in Pokémon?
Sandshrew Candy is a type of Pokémon item packed with energy. When given to certain Pokémon, it increases all of their stats at once.
How many coupons are required in total to receive a Pokétch?
You need a total of three coupons to exchange for a Pokétch.
What is the function of the Gardevoirite item?
Gardevoirite is a type of Mega Stone that, when held by a Gardevoir, enables it to Mega Evolve into Mega Gardevoir during battle.
What is the evolution level required for Toedscool to evolve into Toedscruel?
Toedscool evolves into Toedscruel at level 30.
What is the role of Kartana in competitive play and which teammates help it overcome its defensive weaknesses?

Kartana functions as a deadly wallbreaker on balance and bulky offense teams, capable of ravaging stall and bulkier teams using its high Attack and Swords Dance. Because Kartana has poor special bulk and is vulnerable to Fire- and Fighting-types, it appreciates teammates like Ting-Lu and Gliscor to sponge special hits, as well as Pecharunt, Toxapex, and Galarian Slowking to check threats that can revenge kill it.
What is the purpose of the Legendary Clue 1 in Generation VIII?

The Legendary Clue 1 is a Key Item used to learn more about Calyrex. Reading it is required to locate Calyrex and successfully complete the 'The Sacred Bonds of Sovereign and Steed!' expedition set by Peony. Its contents update as the player progresses through the story.
What are some of the key threats or counters that can hinder Necrozma in the UU tier?

Necrozma is hindered by several Dark-types in the tier, such as Zarude, Mandibuzz, and Hydreigon, which can effectively counter at least one of its sets. Additionally, it struggles against status conditions inflicted by Pokemon like Chansey and Hippowdon, which limit its ability to sweep. Other common threats like Hydreigon and Slowking can also make it difficult to utilize the Meteor Beam set due to its reliance on Power Herb.
How does the Perish Song move affect the Pokémon that hear it?

When a Pokémon hears Perish Song, it is given a counter that starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at the end of every turn. If the counter reaches zero, the Pokémon faints, unless it switches out of battle before that time.
What are some recommended items for Cobalion in competitive play and what do they provide?

Cobalion can utilize Leftovers for increased longevity, Rocky Helmet to punish contact move users like Lokix, Weavile, Scizor, and Tyranitar with chip damage, or a Shuca Berry to safely handle unboosted Earthquakes from Excadrill.
What are the common roles and key movesets for Lycanroc in the ZU tier?

In ZU, Lycanroc functions as an offensive sweeper, wallbreaker, and entry hazard lead. As a sweeper or wallbreaker, it often utilizes Swords Dance to boost its Attack, with Stone Edge or Rock Blast (paired with Loaded Dice) for STAB, Accelerock for priority, and Close Combat for coverage. As a lead, it utilizes Stealth Rock, Taunt to deny hazards, and Endeavor to weaken foes.
What is the primary effect of the Ability Contrary?
The Ability Contrary causes any stat changes that would affect the Pokémon to be inverted, meaning that stat increases act as decreases and stat decreases act as increases.
What is the recommended EV spread, nature, and item for a Choice Band Liepard set, and what purpose do they serve?

A Choice Band Liepard set utilizes maximum Attack investment to maximize power. It uses maximum Speed investment with a Jolly nature to ensure it outspeeds base 105 Speed Pokemon like Cryogonal. Black Glasses can also be used as an alternative to Choice Band if the player primarily spams Knock Off.
What is the primary effect of the Soundproof ability?
The Soundproof ability grants the Pokémon immunity to all sound-based moves, preventing them from taking effect or dealing damage when used against the Pokémon.
How can a trainer evolve their Skitty into a Delcatty?
A Skitty evolves into a Delcatty when it is exposed to a Moon Stone.
What is Simipour's role in the ZU tier and what are some of its key strengths?

Simipour serves as a strong special wallbreaker in ZU, favored for its high Special Attack, solid Speed tier, and access to Nasty Plot. It utilizes powerful STAB moves like Hydro Pump alongside coverage options such as Ice Beam and Focus Blast. Players often use Waterium Z for a one-time nuke or leverage Substitute to safely set up or take advantage of its Torrent ability to boost Hydro Pump's power.
Under what circumstances will the move Attract fail to work on a target?
The move Attract will fail if the user and the target are the same gender, or if either the user or the target is genderless.
What is the primary effect of using Slowpoke Candy on a Pokémon?
Slowpoke Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What is the primary role of Bombirdier in the PU tier and why does it require Heavy-Duty Boots?

Bombirdier serves as one of PU's best offensive pivots and Knock Off spreaders. It requires Heavy-Duty Boots to be an effective pivot because it is vulnerable to entry hazards, although it does appreciate teammates like Scrafty or Paldean Tauros-F that can switch into Knock Off for it.
What are the base stats of the Paradox Pokémon Walking Wake?
Walking Wake has base stats of 99 HP, 83 Attack, 91 Defense, 125 Sp. Atk, 83 Sp. Def, and 109 Speed.
At what level does a Ponyta evolve into a Rapidash?
A Ponyta evolves into a Rapidash at level 40.
What is the specific requirement for Tyrogue to evolve into Hitmonlee?
Tyrogue evolves into Hitmonlee starting at level 20, specifically when its Attack stat is higher than its Defense stat.
What is the primary effect of the move Simple Beam?
Simple Beam is a move that changes the target's Ability to Simple.
What is the function of the Meteorite Shard item in Pokémon?
The Meteorite Shard is a Pokémon item used to cause the Meteorite to transform into its final form, which allows the Pokémon Rayquaza to Mega Evolve.
What are the base stats and primary types of the Pokémon Phantump?
Phantump is a Ghost/Grass type Pokémon. Its base stats are as follows: HP 43, Attack 70, Defense 48, Sp. Atk 50, Sp. Def 60, and Speed 38.
Why is Unfezant considered an unreliable support choice in the SM metagame?

Unfezant is unreliable because its support set relies on the 60% accuracy of Hypnosis and lacks better utility options. It is outclassed by Alolan Persian, which offers higher Speed, defensive utility, and access to Parting Shot. Furthermore, Unfezant's weakness to Stealth Rock limits its ability to safely pivot with U-turn or set up Tailwind repeatedly throughout a battle.
Who is the intended recipient of the Letter item found in the Devon Corporation?
The Letter item contains a message from the President of the Devon Corporation that is intended to be delivered to Steven.
What is the potential secondary effect of the move Bone Club?
The move Bone Club inflicts regular damage and has a percentage-based chance to make the target flinch.
What are the base stats and primary types of the Fossil Pokémon Dracozolt?
Dracozolt is an Electric/Dragon-type Pokémon. Its base stats are HP 90, Attack 100, Defense 90, Sp. Atk 80, Sp. Def 70, and Speed 75.
What happens when a Pokémon holds a Bug Gem and uses a damaging Bug-type move?
When a Pokémon holds a Bug Gem and uses a damaging Bug-type move, the move's power is increased by 1.5 times, and the item is consumed after that single use.
What is the recommended Choice Band set for Krookodile in the UU metagame, including its ability and EV spread?

The Choice Band set utilizes Intimidate to boost staying power. It features an EV spread of Attack and Speed investment to hit hard and outspeed threats like Lucario, with 4 Defense EVs to optimize HP for reduced Stealth Rock damage. A Jolly nature is recommended to maximize Speed. Key moves include Earthquake, Knock Off, Stone Edge (or Superpower), and Pursuit.
What is the function of the Mega Tiara item in Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire?
The Mega Tiara is an item that contains an untold power that enables Pokémon carrying a Mega Stone to Mega Evolve during battle.
What is the purpose of the Plasma Card in Generation V games?
The Plasma Card is a Key Item in Generation V that is required by the player to access restricted areas of the Plasma Frigate.
What is the primary effect of holding the Green Scarf in a Pokémon Contest?
The Green Scarf increases the holder's Cleverness during the primary round of a Pokémon Contest, the Visual Competition of a Super Contest, and the Introduction Round of a Contest Spectacular.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Fire/Ghost-type Pokémon Ceruledge?
Ceruledge has the following base stats: HP 75, Attack 125, Defense 80, Sp. Atk 60, Sp. Def 100, and Speed 85. Its primary ability is Flash Fire, and its hidden ability is Weak Armor.
At what level does a Voltorb evolve into an Electrode?
A Voltorb evolves into an Electrode when it reaches level 30.
What is the secondary effect of using the move Glaive Rush?
After using Glaive Rush, any attacks directed at the user are guaranteed to hit and will inflict double damage until the user's next turn.
Which stats does the move Coil increase, and what happens when it is powered up by a Poisonium Z?
Coil raises the user's Attack, Defense, and accuracy by one stage each. When powered up by a Poisonium Z into Z-Coil, all of the user's lowered stats are reset.
At what level does Dwebble evolve into Crustle?
Dwebble evolves into Crustle at level 34.
At what levels does Dratini evolve into Dragonair and subsequently into Dragonite?
Dratini evolves into Dragonair at level 30, and Dragonair evolves into Dragonite at level 55.
At what levels does Aron evolve into its subsequent forms?
Aron evolves into Lairon at level 32, and then into Aggron at level 42.
What is the primary effect of the move Supersonic when used in battle?
Supersonic is a move that confuses the target.
What is the function of the Magma Stone in the Pokémon games?
The Magma Stone is an item that causes Heatran to appear at Reversal Mountain. It was unused in games prior to Pokémon Black and White 2.
What is the potential secondary effect of using the move Bolt Strike?
Bolt Strike inflicts regular damage and has a percentage chance to paralyze the target.
What is the primary effect of the Oval Charm item in Pokémon games?
The Oval Charm is a Pokémon item that increases the likelihood of finding Pokémon Eggs at the Day Care or the Nursery.
How long does the whirlpool move trap a target, and what happens if the target is currently using the move dive?

Whirlpool traps the target for 2 to 5 turns, during which the target cannot leave the field and takes damage equal to 1/16 of its max HP at the end of each turn. If the target is in the first turn of dive, whirlpool will hit with double power.
How many steps does a Max Repel last, and how do direction changes affect that duration?

A Max Repel lasts for 250 steps. Changing direction counts as an additional step, which reduces the item's duration. For example, if a player walks 5 steps in one direction and then 5 steps in another, it counts as 11 steps toward the 250-step limit.
What is the evolution method for a Graveler to become a Golem?
Graveler evolves into Golem when it is traded or when it is exposed to a Linking Cord.
What are some effective held item choices for a defensive Pecharunt and why?

Pecharunt can use Heavy-Duty Boots to negate hazard damage while pivoting. Rocky Helmet is used to chip physical attackers like Cinderace, Ogerpon-W, and Rillaboom. Air Balloon is also a viable choice to provide an immunity to Ground-type attacks and Spikes, helping it take on Great Tusk.
What is the description of the Pokémon item TR63?
TR63 is an item that allows the user to attack with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.
What is the purpose of the Pikachu Cup in Pokémon Generation IX?
The Pikachu Cup is a picnic item introduced in Generation IX that serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player's picnic.
What are the eligibility requirements for a Pokémon to be used in the Smogon PU tier?

A Pokémon is eligible for PU if it is not banned to Ubers, UUBL, RUBL, NUBL, or PUBL, and is not classified as OU, UU, RU, or NU by usage. Players are strictly prohibited from using Pokémon from the Uber tier, OU, UUBL, UU, RUBL, RU, NUBL, NU, or PUBL.
What is the primary effect of using a Growlithe Candy on a Pokémon?
Growlithe Candy is an energy-packed item that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What are the base stats and primary types of the Pokémon Flamigo?
Flamigo is a Flying/Fighting type Pokémon. Its base stats are: HP 82, Attack 115, Defense 74, Sp. Atk 75, Sp. Def 64, and Speed 90.
What is the primary role of Swoobat in competitive play and what abilities or moves help it succeed?

Swoobat functions as a special wallbreaker and revenge killer, utilizing its high Speed to outpace common threats. Its offensive pressure is bolstered by moves like U-turn for pivoting, Shadow Ball for coverage, and Hidden Power Ground to hit Steel-types. Additionally, Swoobat can act as a potent Calm Mind sweeper by leveraging its Simple ability and Stored Power.
What effect does the Jade Orb have on the game?
The Jade Orb is a Pokémon item that causes Rayquaza to appear in the embedded tower.
What is the function of the item TM48?
TM48 is an item that teaches a compatible Pokémon the move Skill Swap, which allows the user to switch abilities with the target on the same turn.
What happens when a Pokémon uses the move Bouncy Bubble?
Bouncy Bubble inflicts regular damage by shooting water bubbles at the target. The user then absorbs water to restore its HP by half of the damage dealt to the target.
At what level does Sliggoo evolve into Goodra?
Sliggoo evolves into Goodra at level 50.
What is the primary effect of the Pokémon move Psych Up?
Psych Up allows the user to discard its own stat changes and copy the stat changes and effects of the target Pokémon.
What is the origin of the Old Charm in Pokémon?
The Old Charm is a Key Item in the Pokémon series that is described as a good-luck charm made of Pokémon bones.
What happens if a move attempts to remove the Thanks Mail item from a Pokémon holding it?
Any move that attempts to remove the Thanks Mail item from a Pokémon holding it will fail.
What specific team support does Volcarona require in BW OU and why?

Volcarona requires Rapid Spin support in BW OU because it has a 4x weakness to Stealth Rock. Additionally, it fits best on offensive teams that can provide this support and effectively check or defeat opposing Pokemon that Volcarona's coverage moves cannot handle.
What items can Gigalith hold to improve its performance in battle according to its XY competitive strategy?

Gigalith can utilize Leftovers for passive recovery or a Rocky Helmet to chip at physical offensive pivots like Persian and Furfrou. Additionally, the Custap Berry can be used to potentially get an extra hit off when at low health, serving as an emergency check to sweepers if the Sturdy ability is active.
What is the specific requirement for Lickitung to evolve into Lickilicky?
Lickitung evolves into Lickilicky when it is leveled up while knowing the move Rollout.
What is the effect of the Analytic ability on a Pokémon's moves?
The Analytic ability increases the power of a Pokémon's moves by 1.3 times if the Pokémon acts last during the turn. Note that this effect does not apply to the moves future sight and doom desire.
What is Moomoo Cheese used for?
Moomoo Cheese is a Pokémon item that serves as an ingredient for cooking at your camp, specifically helping to add richness to curry.
Which teammates work well with Genesect according to its competitive strategy?
Deoxys-S, Deoxys-A, and Froslass are recommended teammates for Genesect because it is effective at luring in Latias, Palkia, and Arceus-Grass, which dislike taking boosted U-turns.
What is the move Leaf Blade and how is it classified?
Leaf Blade is a move classified as a physical, Grass-type damaging move.
How does Morelull use its spores when it is in danger?
When in danger, Morelull scatters spores that burst into bright, glittering sparks. The pulsing light from these spores is capable of inducing drowsiness.
What is the name of the move described in the provided text?
The move described is titled Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom.
What is the primary role of Armarouge in the RU tier and what are its key strengths?

Armarouge functions as both a wallbreaker and a sweeper in the RU tier. Its strengths include the high power of its Armor Cannon, an excellent STAB combination that threatens Steel-types like Jirachi and Registeel, and the Weak Armor ability, which allows it to boost its Speed when hit by physical moves like U-turn or Rapid Spin.
What is the role of Kleavor on hyper offense teams and what are its key moves and items?

Kleavor acts as a lead on hyper offense teams, utilizing Stone Axe to set up Stealth Rock and provide offensive utility. Key moves include Stone Axe, U-turn for momentum, Swords Dance to pressure defensive foes, Close Combat for coverage, and Trailblaze to boost Speed. A Focus Sash is often held to prevent being KOed by faster threats, and it benefits from the Sharpness ability.
What is the effect of using a Timid Mint on a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon smells a Timid Mint, its Speed will grow more easily, while its Attack will grow more slowly.
What kind of Pokémon is Kingdra?
Kingdra is a Pokémon species as noted in the provided knowledge base.
What effect does the Kee Berry have when held by a Pokémon during battle?
When a Pokémon holds a Kee Berry and is hit by a physical move, the item is consumed to increase the holder's Defense by one stage.
What kind of move does TR15 represent in Pokémon?
TR15 is a move that attacks the target with an intense blast of all-consuming fire and carries a chance to leave the target with a burn.
What roles can Ribombee fulfill in a competitive team, and what are its primary weaknesses?

Ribombee serves as a versatile threat, acting as an offensive pivot with Sticky Web, a wallbreaker with Choice Specs, or a cleaner via Quiver Dance. It is also effective at revenge killing. Its main weaknesses include Steel- and Fire-types, as well as specially defensive walls like Aggron, Magmortar, and Gigalith, which limit its effectiveness due to its average Special Attack and limited coverage.
What effect does the Gorilla Tactics ability have on a Pokémon's stats and move usage?

Gorilla Tactics boosts the Pokémon's Attack by 50% but restricts the Pokémon to using only one move, functioning similarly to a Choice Band. This effect stacks with Choice items, resulting in a total Attack boost of 225%.
How many Ghost Tera Shards are required to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Ghost?

To change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Ghost, you need to use 50 Ghost Tera Shards at the Treasure Eatery in Medali. This process is applicable to most Pokémon, with the exceptions of Ogerpon and Terapagos.
What is the recommended role and moveset for Assault Vest Okidogi in competitive play?

Assault Vest Okidogi serves as a bulky attacker designed to make progress through its mixed bulk and Toxic Chain. Its moveset includes Knock Off for utility and item removal, a Fighting-type STAB move to pressure poison-immune foes, and Ice Punch for coverage against threats like Gliscor and Dragonite. It uses 16 Speed EVs to outpace Adamant Kingambit and Ursaluna. Tera Water or Dark are recommended defensive options to improve its resistance profile.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokemon Poltchageist?
Poltchageist has base stats of 40 HP, 45 Attack, 45 Defense, 74 Sp. Atk, 54 Sp. Def, and 50 Speed. Its primary ability is Hospitality, and its hidden ability is Heatproof.
How does the move Rage Powder function when used by a Pokémon?

When a Pokémon uses Rage Powder, any moves opposing Pokémon target solely at the user's ally will instead target the user until the end of the turn. This effect takes priority over lightning rod and storm drain. If both Pokémon on the same side use this move, the one that uses it last becomes the target.
What happens if you give a Cover Fossil to a scientist in a museum?
If you give a Cover Fossil to a scientist in a museum, you will receive a Tirtouga.
What happens to a Pokémon's Speed stat when it has the Steadfast ability and flinches?
When a Pokémon with the Steadfast ability flinches, its Speed stat increases by one stage.
What is the function of the Pokémon ability Stalwart?
The Stalwart ability allows a Pokémon to ignore the effects of opposing Pokémon's abilities and moves that draw in moves.
What is the effect of using the item TR19 in battle?
When using TR19, the user performs a simultaneous three-beam attack. This move has the potential to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
What is the primary strategy for using Accelgor as a late-game cleaner in SS?

Accelgor functions as a lethal late-game cleaner by using Bug Buzz to trigger Throat Spray, granting a +1 Special Attack boost while activating the Unburden ability to outspeed every other Pokemon in the metagame. It utilizes Focus Blast for Klinklang and Piloswine, Sludge Bomb for Clefairy and Alcremie, and Giga Drain for walls like Rhydon, Palossand, and Qwilfish.
How does Shell Side Arm determine whether it acts as a physical or special move?

Shell Side Arm forecasts whether its base damage would be higher as a physical or special move and chooses the category that would inflict more damage. If the damage is tied, it chooses the category randomly.
What happens two turns after Tr34 is used?
Two turns after the move Tr34 is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.
What is the purpose of the ingredient Yogurt in Generation IX?
Yogurt is an ingredient introduced in Generation IX that can be used to make a sandwich.
What is the primary role of Avalugg in competitive play, and what are its key weaknesses?

Avalugg functions as a premier physical wall for balanced and defensive teams due to its massive Defense stat and access to Rapid Spin and Recover. Its main weaknesses include extreme special frailty, making it vulnerable to special wallbreakers like Munkidori and Porygon-Z, and a reliance on Heavy-Duty Boots to mitigate its Stealth Rock weakness, making it susceptible to Knock Off.
How does the Neutralizing Gas ability interact with other abilities when the user switches out of battle?

When the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas switches out, any suppressed abilities that activate upon being gained will trigger before the switch occurs. For example, if Intimidate is reactivated this way, it will lower the Attack stat of the Pokémon with Neutralizing Gas rather than the incoming Pokémon.
What is the utility role of Cinderace and which move enables it?

Cinderace serves as a valuable utility pivot by using the move Court Change, which switches entry hazards to the opposing side of the field. This ability helps hazard-weak teammates safely enter the battle and also allows Cinderace to swap away Aurora Veil set by opposing Alolan Ninetales.
What is the recommended competitive moveset and role for Darmanitan in the XY UU tier?

Darmanitan functions as a revenge killer and late-game cleaner using a Choice Scarf, a Jolly nature, and maxed Attack and Speed EVs. Its moveset includes Flare Blitz, Rock Slide, U-turn, and either Earthquake or Superpower in the final slot. Its ability is Sheer Force to boost the power of moves like Flare Blitz and Rock Slide, and 4 EVs are placed in Special Defense to manipulate the Porygon line's Download ability.
What are the base stats and primary ability of the Paradox Pokémon Iron Leaves?
Iron Leaves has the ability Quark Drive. Its base stats consist of 90 HP, 130 Attack, 88 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 108 Special Defense, and 104 Speed.
What is the effect of the Mystic Water item in the main Pokémon games?
In the main Pokémon games, the Mystic Water is a type-enhancing item that increases the power of the holder's Water-type moves. It provides a power boost of 10% in some generations and 20% in others.
What kind of move is Tackle in the Pokémon series?
Tackle is a move featured in the Pokémon series.
What is the effect of the move Trick?

Trick is a move that causes the user and the target to swap their held items. If either the user or the target is not holding an item, they will still exchange items, resulting in one Pokémon gaining an item and the other losing theirs.
What are the effects of using the move Autotomize?
Autotomize raises the user's Speed by two stages and halves the user's weight. The weight reduction effect does not stack.
What is the purpose of the Works Key in the Generation IV games?
The Works Key is a Key Item that allows the player to unlock the door to the Valley Windworks, which enables them to confront Team Galactic.
What is the function of the Mawilite in Pokémon battles?

The Mawilite is a Mega Stone that allows a Mawile to Mega Evolve into Mega Mawile, provided its Trainer possesses a Key Stone. Trainers can only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon present at any given moment.
What roles does Genesect fill in the Ubers metagame, and which Pokemon are considered its major counters?

Genesect serves as an effective momentum gainer and revenge killer in the Ubers tier, utilizing Download to boost its attacks and U-turn to maintain offensive pressure. However, its effectiveness is hindered by Primal Groudon and Ho-Oh, which are major threats and counters to Genesect in the metagame.
What is a unique property of the move Grassy Glide when used on Grassy Terrain?
When used on Grassy Terrain, the move Grassy Glide always goes first.
What is the name of the move described in the text?
The move described in the text is Prismatic Laser.
What is the primary purpose of a Balm Mushroom in Pokémon games?
A Balm Mushroom is an item described as cult vendor trash. It is a rare mushroom that gives off a pleasant fragrance and is primarily used to be sold to shops for a high price.
What is the base Special Attack stat for Lunala and what is its primary ability?
Lunala has a base Special Attack stat of 137, and its ability is Shadow Shield.
At what level does Bidoof evolve into Bibarel?
Bidoof evolves into Bibarel at level 15.
What happens if a move tries to remove Space Mail from a Pokémon holding it?
If a Pokémon is holding the Space Mail item, any move that attempts to remove it from the holder will fail.
Why is Archeops considered ineffective as a Stealth Rock suicide lead in the NU metagame?

Archeops struggles due to the Defeatist ability, a slower Speed tier compared to competitors like Aerodactyl that fail to outspeed threats such as Sceptile and Whimsicott, and the fact that the dedicated suicide lead role is relatively unimportant in the current metagame.
What is the secondary effect of the move Sandsear Storm when it hits a target?
Sandsear Storm attacks the target by wrapping them in fierce winds and searingly hot sand, and it has a chance to leave the target with a burn.
What happens when Duosion's two brains think the same way?
When Duosion's two brains think alike, it exhibits greater psychic powers, which are said to be capable of traveling up to half a mile away.
What is the primary function of the Heavy Duty Boots item in a Pokémon battle?
The Heavy Duty Boots are a Pokémon item designed to protect the user by preventing the effects of any traps that have been set on the battlefield.
What is Scrafty's primary weakness in the current competitive meta?

Scrafty is completely countered by defensive Sylveon, which renders it deadweight in that common matchup. It also struggles against defensive staples like Mantine and Vileplume, is vulnerable to the tier's many threatening Fighting-types, and often provides switch-in opportunities for Pokemon like Passimian and Toxicroak.
Under what conditions does the Pokémon move Avalanche inflict double power?
Avalanche inflicts double power if the target has inflicted damage on the user during the same turn. Note that pain split does not count as damaging the user.
What is the specific requirement for a Bisharp to evolve into a Kingambit?
A Bisharp evolves into a Kingambit upon leveling up after the player defeats three Bisharp that are holding a Leader's Crest.
What is the primary role of Tapu Koko in competitive play and which items can it use to enhance its offensive capabilities?

Tapu Koko serves as a consistent offensive pivot that threatens various Water- and Flying-types and checks Electric- and Fighting-type threats. To enhance its offensive power, it can utilize Electrium Z to boost its Thunderbolt for picking off weakened threats or OHKOing specific Pokemon like Ogerpon-W and Mega Diancie. Alternatively, Fairium Z can be equipped to immediately OHKO foes such as Great Tusk and Raging Bolt.
What is the effect of the Misty Surge ability when a Pokémon enters a battle?
When a Pokémon with the Misty Surge ability enters a battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.
At what level does Snubbull evolve into Granbull, and what are its base stats?
Snubbull evolves into Granbull at level 23. Its base stats are: HP 60, Attack 80, Defense 50, Sp. Atk 40, Sp. Def 40, and Speed 30.
What is the purpose of the Geodude Candy item in Pokémon?
Geodude Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all their stats at once.
What is the primary role of Pincurchin in SS competitive play and which items are commonly used with it?

Pincurchin serves as an Electric Terrain setter on Electric Terrain teams due to its Electric Surge ability. Common items include the Terrain Extender to maximize the duration of Electric Terrain, or the Eject Button to bring in teammates for free. Offensive Trick Room sets may run a Life Orb or Choice Specs along with moves like Rising Voltage, Hydro Pump, Spikes, and Memento.
What is the primary effect of using the Sacred Ash item on a Pokémon party?
When used, Sacred Ash revives all fainted Pokémon in the party and fully restores their maximum HP.
What is the recommended item for Thundurus in the OU tier, and how do its moves contribute to its competitive role?

The recommended item for Thundurus is Leftovers. It functions as a potent offensive threat and disruptor with Prankster Thunder Wave for speed control, Nasty Plot for setup, and Volt Switch to gain momentum. Hidden Power Ice handles Ground, Grass, and Dragon-types, while Focus Blast threatens targets like Excadrill and Ferrothorn. Its speed and typing allow it to act as a pivot, though it lacks reliable recovery and is weak to Stealth Rock.
How does the move Meteor Beam function during a battle?
Meteor Beam is a two-turn attack where the user gathers space power and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn. On the second turn, the user attacks the target to inflict regular damage.
What are the recommended abilities for Zebstrika, and how do they benefit its performance in battle?

Zebstrika's preferred ability is Lightning Rod, which lets it switch into and check other Electric-types while boosting its Special Attack. Alternatively, Sap Sipper can be used to better check Grass-types like Jumpluff and Simisage, providing a way to safely swap into them when necessary.
What are the base stats, types, and abilities of Parasect?

Parasect is a Bug/Grass type Pokémon with the following base stats: HP 60, Attack 95, Defense 80, Sp. Atk 60, Sp. Def 80, and Speed 30. Its available abilities are Effect Spore and Dry Skin, and it has Damp as a hidden ability.
What is the role of Barbaracle in competitive play and what support does it typically need?

Barbaracle functions as a Shell Smash sweeper on hyper offense teams. It excels when paired with dual screens support from Pokemon like Klefki and entry hazard support from partners like Golisopod or Roserade to help wear down checks like Milotic and Sturdy Steelix. Misty Terrain support from Galarian Weezing can also protect it from status effects while it sets up.
What is the function of the Pokémon item HM07?
HM07 is an item that teaches the move Waterfall to a compatible Pokémon. The move allows the user to attack the foe with a powerful charge and can also be used to climb waterfalls.
What is the primary function of the Beach Glass item in the game?
The Beach Glass has no practical or functional purpose in the game other than to be sold as a valuable item.
What is the specific use of a Park Ball in the Pokémon series?
A Park Ball is a special Poké Ball used by a trainer to catch a wild Pokémon, but it can exclusively be used within the Pal Park.
What is the recommended EV spread for Hatterene in competitive play and what is its primary purpose?

Hatterene utilizes 52 Speed EVs specifically to outspeed Garganacl and Toxapex, allowing it to effectively use Psychic Noise to block their recovery. It functions as an entry hazard control option on bulky offense and offense teams, while also serving to check key threats such as Zamazenta, Great Tusk, and Deoxys-S.
What is unique about the way Totodile sleeps, as noted in Pokémon Sleep?

As shown in Pokémon Sleep, Totodile and its evolutions practice unihemispheric sleep, where they rest only half of their brain at a time and sleep with one eye open. This behavior is believed to be a defense mechanism used to protect against enemy attacks.
What is the primary effect of the Shadow move Shadow Mist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness?
Shadow Mist is a Shadow version of Sweet Scent that lowers the evasion of both opponents by two stages each.
How does Secret Sword calculate damage against a target?
Secret Sword inflicts regular damage, and the damage calculation always uses the target's Defense stat, regardless of the move's damage class.
What is the primary function of the thick layer of blubber on a Walrein's body?
Walrein's thick layer of blubber provides insulation against the cold in the icy seas where it lives, and it also protects the Pokémon from enemy attacks by causing them to bounce off.
What effect does the Cloud Nine ability have during a Pokémon battle?
While a Pokémon with Cloud Nine is in battle, weather remains in play, but its effects are negated and eliminated. This ability functions identically to the ability air lock.
What is the Sapphire item in the games Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen?
In Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen, the Sapphire is a Key Item.
How does Klinklang utilize its move pool to handle counters and threats in the ZU tier?

Klinklang uses Shift Gear to boost its stats, allowing its Gear Grind to break defensive walls. It can use Substitute to block status and weak hits, or Magnet Rise to avoid Earthquake from threats like Rhydon and Alolan Dugtrio. Toxic helps cripple counters like Rapidash, Alolan Persian, Sableye, and Stunfisk. Alternatively, Wild Charge is an option to hit Water-types such as Qwilfish, Poliwrath, and Cramorant.
What is the secondary effect of the move Aurora Beam?
Aurora Beam inflicts regular damage and has a chance to lower the target's Attack stat by one stage.
How does Ice Shard behave in the game Pokémon UNITE?

In Pokémon UNITE, Ice Shard is Mamoswine's first move as Swinub. The user hurls three ice chunks at a designated area, dealing damage and slowing enemies. If an enemy is struck by all three chunks, they become frozen for a short duration. Upon reaching level 5 and evolving into Piloswine, the move is replaced by either Icicle Crash or Ice Fang.
What is the effect of using Salt Cure on a Water or Steel-type Pokémon?
When a Water or Steel-type Pokémon is affected by Salt Cure, it receives damage equal to 1/4 of its maximum HP per turn, rather than the standard 1/8 of its maximum HP.
How does the move Power Trick affect a Pokémon's stats?
Power Trick is a non-damaging Psychic-type move that swaps the user's raw Attack stat with its raw Defense stat, while leaving stat modifiers unchanged.
At what level does Yamask evolve into Cofagrigus?
Yamask evolves into Cofagrigus at level 34.
What is the primary reason for using Galvantula in competitive play, and what move helps make its STAB attack more reliable?

The primary reason to run Galvantula is its access to Sticky Web, which reduces an opponent's Speed by one stage upon switching in. To make its high-powered STAB move Thunder more reliable, Galvantula utilizes the Compound Eyes ability, which provides a massive accuracy boost.
What is the primary effect of the move Mach Punch?
Mach Punch is a move that inflicts regular damage and always goes first, as it is thrown at blinding speed to ensure it strikes before the opponent.
What is the recommended EV spread and held item for Mandibuzz to serve as a defensive pivot?

To function as an effective defensive pivot, Mandibuzz should be invested with maximum HP and Special Defense EVs. The item Leftovers is recommended to provide Mandibuzz with passive recovery, which helps maintain its health so it can consistently check threats such as Celebi, Mega Sceptile, Mega Blastoise, and Hydreigon.
What are some of the primary moves and the purpose of the EV spread for a competitive Celesteela?

Celesteela utilizes Leech Seed for sustain, Protect for scouting Choice and Z-Move users, Heavy Slam as a strong STAB move, and Flamethrower to hit Steel and Grass-types. Its EV spread features 24 Defense EVs to avoid being OHKOed by Jolly Mega Medicham's High Jump Kick, with the remaining EVs allocated to Special Defense to better handle special attackers like Mega Alakazam and Tapu Lele, paired with a Sassy nature.
How should Decidueye be built to effectively function as a wallbreaker in SM competitive play?

To function as a wallbreaker, Decidueye should utilize Nasty Plot to increase its Special Attack, paired with Ghostium Z to transform Shadow Ball into the powerful Never-Ending Nightmare. Key moves include Shadow Ball, Leaf Storm for coverage, and Roost for recovery. Trainers should invest in maximum Speed with a Timid nature to outrun threats like Incineroar and Xatu, and maximum Special Attack to secure OHKOs on Pokemon like Palossand and Steelix after a boost.
How does the Volt Absorb ability affect a Pokémon when it is hit by an Electric-type move?

When a Pokémon with the Volt Absorb ability is hit by an Electric-type move, it restores 1/4 of its maximum HP instead of taking damage and negates any other effects of the move. This ability does not take effect if the Pokémon is a Ground-type that is already immune to Electric moves.
What are some effective teammates for Flapple in competitive play?

Flapple benefits from bulky pivots like Uxie, Alolan Persian, and Rotom-S to help it switch in safely. Coalossal and Qwilfish provide entry hazard support and pressure Fairy-types like Alcremie. Special attackers like Cramorant and Rotom pair well with it, as Flapple pressures special walls, while Ninetales and Rapidash can manage Ice- and Steel-type threats like Articuno and Klinklang that Flapple struggles to handle.
What effect does the held item Mystic Water have on a Pokémon?
Mystic Water is a held item that increases the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 20%.
At what level does Cosmoem evolve into either Solgaleo or Lunala?
Cosmoem evolves into either Solgaleo or Lunala at level 53.
What is the recommended moveset, item, and EV spread for Swanna in XY competitive play?

Swanna typically runs Hurricane, Scald, Defog, and Roost. It utilizes maximum Special Attack and Speed investment with a Timid nature to maximize its offensive presence. A Life Orb is the preferred item to increase damage output, while the Hydration ability is an option for rain teams.
At what level does a Metang evolve into a Metagross?
A Metang evolves into a Metagross at level 45.
What kind of habitat does Frillish typically reside in?

Frillish is a hadopelagic Pokémon that lives in dens located approximately 5 miles, or 8 kilometers, under the sea surface. Because of this environment, the Pokémon is capable of coping with extremely dark and highly pressurized sea conditions.
How is the power of Pika Papow determined and what is its accuracy?
The power of Pika Papow is determined by how much a Pikachu loves its Trainer, with greater affection resulting in higher power. It is a move that never misses.
How does Comfey function in a competitive battle and what are its notable limitations?

Comfey functions as a dangerous Terrain sweeper using Calm Mind and Triage-boosted Draining Kiss, or as a bulky Defogger. It checks Dark- and Fighting-types, but is limited by mediocre Special Attack, a lack of coverage for Steel-types like Doublade and Ferroseed, and sand weakening its Synthesis recovery. Additionally, it faces stiff competition from faster, more versatile Fairy-types like Ribombee and Whimsicott.
What happens to a Pokémon using Magnet Rise if it is also holding an Iron Ball?
If a Pokémon is holding an Iron Ball, it can still use Magnet Rise; however, the user remains on the ground until the Iron Ball is removed from them.
What are the competitive roles and benefits of using Tera Dragon versus Tera Fire on Eternatus in the Ubers tier?

Tera Dragon amplifies Dynamax Cannon for wallbreaking, allowing it to 2HKO physically defensive Ho-Oh and 3HKO Ting-Lu. Tera Fire provides STAB for Fire Blast and eliminates Dragon and Psychic weaknesses, improving the matchup against Koraidon, Mewtwo, and opposing Eternatus, while also providing resistance to Steel and Fairy-type attacks to handle Zacian-C and Necrozma-DM.
At what level does Tyrunt evolve into Tyrantrum?
Tyrunt evolves into its final form, Tyrantrum, at level 39.
What is the purpose of Seel Candy when given to a Pokémon?
Seel Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What is the function of the Pokémon item known as the N-Solarizer Split?
The N-Solarizer Split is a machine designed to separate Necrozma from Solgaleo.
What is the purpose of the Power Plant Pass item in the Kalos region?
The Power Plant Pass serves as an ID card that permits the holder to gain entry to the Kalos Power Plant, which is located along Route 13.
What is the effect of the Pressure ability on PP consumption when a move is used against a Pokémon that has it?

When a move is used that targets a Pokémon with the Pressure ability, one additional PP is deducted beyond the normal amount. This effect applies even if the move misses, hits multiple targets, or is rendered ineffective by moves like Protect or Detect. If multiple Pokémon on the field have Pressure, each one results in additional PP being deducted.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Fossil Pokémon Aerodactyl?
Aerodactyl has base stats of 80 HP, 105 Attack, 65 Defense, 60 Sp. Atk, 75 Sp. Def, and 130 Speed. Its primary abilities are Rock Head and Pressure, and its hidden ability is Unnerve.
What is the recommended EV spread for a Choice Specs Noivern in the UnderUsed tier?

The recommended EV spread for a Choice Specs Noivern is 252 SpA / 252 Spe to maximize its offensive output and speed. Additionally, 4 SpD EVs are recommended to prevent Porygon-Z from gaining a Special Attack boost from Download.
What happens if a Pokémon holds a Black Sludge item?

The effect depends on the Pokémon's type. If the holder is a Poison-type, it restores 1/16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn. If the holder is not a Poison-type, it takes damage equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn, unless it has the Magic Guard Ability, which grants immunity to this damage.
What is the primary effect of using the move Withdraw in battle?
The move Withdraw functions by having the user pull its body into its hard shell, which results in the user's Defense stat being raised by one stage.
What are some of the primary strengths and weaknesses of Ferrothorn as a defensive Pokémon in the competitive tier?

Ferrothorn is an effective defensive presence thanks to its robust dual typing, great bulk, and utility moves like Stealth Rock, Leech Seed, and Spikes. It excels at checking Pokemon such as Tapu Koko, Choice Specs Greninja, and Tapu Fini. However, it suffers from abysmal Speed and weaknesses to Fire and Fighting-type moves, leaving it vulnerable to threats like Mega Medicham, Mega Charizard X, and Heatran. It also lacks reliable healing and its reliance on indirect damage can be negated by Magic Guard users.
What are the base stats for the Fighting/Electric type Paradox Pokémon Iron Hands?
Iron Hands has the following base stats: HP 154, Attack 140, Defense 108, Sp. Atk 50, Sp. Def 68, and Speed 50.
What type of damage does the move Hyper Voice inflict?
Hyper Voice inflicts regular damage on the target.
At what level does Bunnelby evolve into Diggersby?
Bunnelby evolves into Diggersby at level 20.
What specific ability does the Stoutland Search ride service provide in the Alola region?
In the Alola region, Stoutland serves as a Ride Pokémon known as Stoutland Search, which uses its strong nose to help locate hidden items.
What makes Sigilyph an effective threat in the RU tier, and what are its primary weaknesses?

Sigilyph excels in RU due to its versatility, solid Speed, good Special Attack, and the Magic Guard ability, which prevents passive damage. It features varied coverage moves like Psychic, Heat Wave, and Energy Ball, and can use Roost for recovery. Its main weaknesses include susceptibility to Pursuit users like Spiritomb and Sneasel, being outpaced by Pokemon like Delphox and Flygon, and exploitable weaknesses to Dark, Electric, Rock, and Ice-type attacks.
What information is recorded on the Data Card 18 item?
Data Card 18 is an item that records and shows the number of times a trainer has won the Pokéathlon Circle Push event.
What items can be used on Amoonguss and what purposes do they serve in its competitive strategy?

Amoonguss can use Heavy-Duty Boots to avoid entry hazard damage, Rocky Helmet to inflict chip damage on physical attackers like Grimmsnarl and Alolan Sandslash, or Eject Button to provide a one-time pivot that synergizes with its Regenerator ability.
What is the primary effect of the Pokémon move Night Slash?
Night Slash is a move that inflicts regular damage and increases the user's critical hit rate by one level, meaning critical hits land more easily.
What is the purpose of the Winking Pika Pick in Pokémon Generation IX?
The Winking Pika Pick is a picnic item introduced in Generation IX that is used to complete a sandwich made during a picnic.
At what level does Tinkatuff evolve into Tinkaton?
Tinkatuff evolves into Tinkaton at level 38.
What items and moves allow Lunala to consistently maintain its Shadow Shield ability in competitive play?

Lunala consistently maintains Shadow Shield by using the move Roost for reliable recovery in combination with the item Heavy-Duty Boots, which protects it from entry hazards that would otherwise break the ability.
What are the base stats of the Pokémon Houndoom?
Houndoom has the following base stats: HP 75, Attack 90, Defense 50, Sp. Atk 110, Sp. Def 80, and Speed 95.
What happens when a Pokémon with Poison Point is hit by a contact move?

When a Pokémon with the Poison Point ability is hit by a move that makes contact, there is a 1/3 chance that the attacking Pokémon will become poisoned. However, this effect does not apply to Poison-type or Steel-type Pokémon. Additionally, if the move is a multistrike move, each contact hit has an independent 30% chance to activate the ability.
Why is Calyrex considered unviable in the SS ZU tier compared to Galarian Rapidash?

Calyrex is unviable in SS ZU because of its poor typing and lack of offensive coverage, which prevents it from applying pressure. It struggles to set up due to key threats like Klinklang and Skuntank resisting or being immune to its moves, while Articuno walls it by removing boosts with Haze. Conversely, Galarian Rapidash is preferred because it has superior Speed, typing, an ability that avoids Toxic, access to reliable recovery, and better offensive coverage.
What is the purpose of the Blue Petal in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon?
The Blue Petal is a Key Item collected during Mina's trial. Once the player collects all seven petals, Mina combines them to create a Rainbow Flower.
What is the function of the Pokémon item TM70?
TM70 is an item that teaches a compatible Pokémon the move Flash, which cuts the target's accuracy and can also be used to illuminate caves.
What are the common item choices for a Quiver Dance Lilligant and how do they benefit it?

For a Quiver Dance Lilligant, Life Orb provides the extra firepower necessary to break through teams. Alternatively, Leftovers offers passive recovery, which helps Lilligant acquire Quiver Dance boosts against more passive opponents like Galarian Stunfisk.
What is the primary effect of using Pewter Crunchies on a Pokémon?
Pewter Crunchies, which are a famous snack from Pewter City, can be used to heal all status conditions of a single Pokémon.
How can a player obtain or use the Tidal Bell in Pokémon Pokopia?

In Pokémon Pokopia, players can craft the Tidal Bell using five Silver Feathers and five ingots of Rare Pokémetal, a recipe learned after befriending Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres. Once obtained, ringing the Tidal Bell while Lugia is flying overhead will cause it to descend, allowing the player to attempt to befriend it.
What is a unique characteristic of the move Aqua Jet?
Aqua Jet is a move that inflicts regular damage and is guaranteed to strike first, as it always goes first.
What is the primary effect of using the move taught by Tm30?
The item Tm30 teaches the move Shadow Ball, which hurls a shadowy blob at the target and has a chance to lower the target's Sp. Def stat.
What is the primary effect of using the item TR46 in a battle?
TR46 is a Pokémon item that causes the user to harden its body’s surface like iron, which results in a sharp increase to the user's Defense stat.
What is the primary effect of the move Sharpen, and how does it change when used as a Z-Move?

Sharpen is a non-damaging Normal-type move that increases the user's Attack stat by one stage. When powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Sharpen, the move increases the user's Attack stat by an additional stage, resulting in a total increase of two stages.
What is the function of the Sceptilite item in Pokémon?
Sceptilite is a Mega Stone that allows Sceptile to Mega Evolve into Mega Sceptile during battle when held by the Pokémon.
What items and moves are recommended for Miraidon to maximize its performance as a wallbreaker and pivot?

Miraidon benefits from Heavy-Duty Boots to increase longevity by ignoring entry hazards. Key moves include U-turn for pivoting, Taunt to stop hazards and recovery, and Calm Mind to boost power for breaking through checks like Necrozma-DM and Ting-Lu. Solar Beam is an alternative to hit Ground-types, while Tera Fairy provides a Dragon-type immunity, and Tera Dragon significantly boosts the damage of Draco Meteor.
At what level does Lileep evolve into Cradily?
Lileep evolves into Cradily starting at level 40.
What are the secondary effects of the Pokémon move Grav Apple?
