Oranguru is outclassed by Beheeyem, which serves as a better offensive Trick Room setter. Beheeyem possesses a higher Special Attack, a superior ability, better defensive typing, and a wider range of coverage options, making it more effective at utilizing the Trick Room and Nasty Plot combination.
What is the base Special Attack and Speed stat of the Ghost-type Pokémon Spectrier?
Spectrier has a base Special Attack stat of 145 and a base Speed stat of 130.
What is the primary role of Emboar in the XY tier, and what are its notable counters?

Emboar functions as a fearsome wallbreaker in the tier, primarily due to its Reckless ability which powers up its Flare Blitz. It can utilize Choice Band for wallbreaking, Choice Scarf for revenge killing, or a defensive set. Its main counters include bulky Water-types such as Qwilfish, Jellicent, and Alomomola, which prevent it from spamming its powerful attacks.
What is the primary function of the Big Pearl item in the game?
The Big Pearl is considered vendor trash that sparkles with a silvery sheen; its primary purpose is to be sold to shops for a high price.
What is Swanna's role in the ZU tier and what are its primary moves and items?

Swanna serves as a top offensive Defogger and wallbreaker in the ZU tier. Its primary moves include Hurricane and Scald, which utilize its STAB combination, and Roost for longevity. For items, it can utilize Flyinium Z to bypass Hurricane's low accuracy or Life Orb to boost damage output. Swanna's ability, Big Pecks, helps it check foes like Floatzel by avoiding defense drops, and its high speed allows it to threaten Pokemon like Combusken and Silvally-Fighting.
What are the recommended abilities and held item for Kilowattrel in competitive play?

Kilowattrel's preferred held item is Heavy-Duty Boots, which allows for safe and repeated entry throughout a match. Its available abilities include Competitive, which boosts its Special Attack in response to stat-dropping moves and abilities like Intimidate, and Volt Absorb, which acts as a soft check to Electric-types like Raikou, Bellibolt, and Toxtricity.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Pokemon Corsola?
Corsola has the following base stats: HP 65, Attack 55, Defense 95, Sp. Atk 65, Sp. Def 95, and Speed 35. Its primary abilities are Hustle and Natural Cure, and its hidden ability is Regenerator.
What is the effect of the move Soak?
Soak is a move that changes the target's type to pure Water until it leaves the field. However, the move will fail if the target possesses the Multitype ability.
What moves does Tapu Bulu utilize for competitive play in the OU tier and what are their specific roles?

Tapu Bulu uses Wood Hammer for high-damage wallbreaking, Horn Leech for recovery, Superpower to target Steel-types like Heatran, Ferrothorn, and Kartana, and Stone Edge to hit threats like Volcarona, Mega Charizard, and Zapdos. Megahorn is also listed as an optional coverage move.
What effect does Ekans Candy have when given to a Pokémon?
Ekans Candy is a Pokémon item packed with energy that, when given to certain Pokémon, increases all of their stats at once.
What is the evolution level of Taillow into Swellow, and what are its base Speed and Attack stats?
Taillow evolves into Swellow at level 22. Swellow has a base Attack stat of 85 and a base Speed stat of 125.
What is the primary role of Avalugg in the ZU metagame and what support does it require?

In the ZU metagame, Avalugg functions as a physical wall and entry hazard remover on stall teams due to its high physical bulk and access to Rapid Spin. However, it is limited by its low Special Defense and weakness to Stealth Rock. Because of these vulnerabilities, it requires significant support from teammates, specifically a special wall like Bronzor, to cover special attackers such as Combusken, Swanna, and Electivire.
How many Bug Tera Shards are required to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Bug, and where must this occur?
To change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Bug, you must use 50 Bug Tera Shards at the Treasure Eatery located in Medali. Note that this process cannot be performed on Ogerpon or Terapagos.
What is the primary drawback of using the move Frenzy Plant?
After using Frenzy Plant, the user must spend its next turn recharging. During this recharge turn, the user is rendered immobile and cannot attack or switch out.
What is the role of the Choice Scarf item on a competitive Mienshao set?

The Choice Scarf allows Mienshao to outspeed the entire unboosted metagame as well as most other common Choice Scarf users. This item, combined with its base 105 Speed, makes Mienshao the fastest common Choice Scarf user, allowing it to outpace threats like Heracross, Flygon, and Victini.
What is Stunfisk's role in the PU metagame and what moves are recommended for its strategy?

Stunfisk serves as a status spreader and utility provider in the PU tier, utilizing moves like Discharge to paralyze foes, Toxic to cripple walls, and Stealth Rock for support. Earth Power provides STAB coverage against Electric-types, while options like Yawn, Protect, and Sludge Wave offer additional utility. It is typically run with 252 HP EVs and 252 Defense EVs with a Bold nature to maximize physical bulk and trigger its Static ability.
What is the primary effect of holding a Ghostium Z item in a Pokémon battle?
The Ghostium Z is a held item that allows a Pokémon to utilize Z-move equivalents of its Ghost-type moves by upgrading them into Z-Moves using crystallized Z-Power.
What is the evolution level for Pyroar and what are its primary types?
Pyroar evolves from Litleo at level 35. Its primary types are Fire and Normal.
What happens if a Pokémon with the Ability Skill Link uses the move Pin Missile?
When a Pokémon with the Skill Link Ability uses Pin Missile, the move will always hit five times, provided that it does not miss.
How does the move Rollout behave when used in battle?

Rollout inflicts regular damage and locks the user into the move for five turns. The power doubles with each successive hit, reaching a maximum of 16x. The power resets to normal after the lock-in concludes, or if the move misses or becomes unusable. Additionally, the move's power is doubled if the user has utilized Defense Curl since entering the field.
What is the primary function of the item known as Pearl in the game?
Pearl is considered vendor trash, which means it is an item intended to be sold cheaply to shops.
Why is Emolga generally considered a poor choice for competitive play in the SS ZU tier?

In SS ZU, Emolga has underwhelming stats, making it too weak to break through opponents and too frail to serve a defensive role. It is outclassed by other offensive utility options like Alolan Persian and Rotom. Furthermore, its role as a pivot is hindered by inconsistency and poor synergy between its best STAB move, Acrobatics, and the use of Heavy-Duty Boots, which are necessary to avoid being crippled by entry hazards.
What is Orthworm's role in the ZU tier and what are its primary strengths and weaknesses?

Orthworm is a defensive entry hazard setter in ZU. Its strengths include a Steel typing, high Defense, and the Earth Eater ability which grants a Ground immunity. It uses Stealth Rock, Spikes, Iron Defense, and Coil to support the team. Its primary weaknesses are vulnerability to special attacks and a lack of reliable recovery, which can lead to it being worn down quickly.
What is the primary effect of the Shell Armor ability in battle?
The Shell Armor ability prevents moves from scoring critical hits against the Pokémon that possesses it. It functions identically to the Battle Armor ability.
What moves and roles make Melmetal a centralizing force in LGPE OU?

Melmetal is a top-tier tank and defensive Steel-type thanks to its high HP, Attack, and Defense. Its movepool includes the spammable STAB move Double Iron Bash, along with coverage options like Earthquake, Thunder Punch, and Superpower, allowing it to threaten most of the metagame. While it reliably checks threats like Mega Alakazam and Mega Aerodactyl, it suffers from a lack of recovery, low Speed, and susceptibility to special attackers and specific coverage moves like Earthquake and Flamethrower.
What are the base stats of the Fire Child Pokémon Charcadet?
Charcadet has a base HP of 40, Attack of 50, Defense of 40, Special Attack of 50, Special Defense of 40, and Speed of 35.
What happens when a Pokémon with the Synchronize ability is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon?

When a Pokémon with Synchronize is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon is inflicted with the same status condition. If the Pokémon is badly poisoned, the attacking Pokémon is also inflicted with the bad poison condition.
What is the primary effect of the Electric Gem when a Pokémon holds it?

When held by a Pokémon, the Electric Gem increases the power of the first Electric-type move used by 30% and is then consumed after use. Additionally, if the user is holding an Electric Gem, the move Fling will fail.
What role does Shiinotic play in the ZU tier and what are its main advantages?

Shiinotic functions as a defensive Pokemon in ZU. It utilizes its typing, decent bulk, and access to Strength Sap and Spore to serve as a wall. Its Effect Spore ability allows it to check threats like Silvally-Fighting and Torterra, while its high Special Defense allows it to soft check special attackers such as Silvally-Dragon, Simipour, and Kadabra. It can also pressure frail Pokemon with Moonblast and Giga Drain.
At what level does Kabuto evolve into Kabutops?
Kabuto evolves into Kabutops starting at level 40.
What happens on the battlefield when the Z-Move Genesis Supernova is used?
Genesis Supernova is a damage-dealing Psychic-type Z-Move that, upon being used, causes the battlefield to become Psychic Terrain for five turns.
How does Bibarel use its teeth, and what materials does it use to build its nest?
Bibarel uses its teeth to chew trees, bark, roots, and branches. It builds its nest by damming rivers using these materials, along with mud.
What are the base stats and primary ability for the Psychic-type Pokémon Mewtwo?
Mewtwo has the following base stats: HP 106, Attack 110, Defense 90, Sp. Atk 154, Sp. Def 90, and Speed 130. Its primary ability is Pressure.
What happens when a Pokémon holding a Psychic Seed is in battle and Psychic Terrain is activated?
When a Pokémon holding a Psychic Seed is in battle and Psychic Terrain is activated, the item is consumed and the holder's Special Defense is raised by one stage. It can only be used once.
What are the primary utility moves available to Serperior, and what limitations does it face in a competitive setting?

Serperior's utility moves include Glare, Taunt, Knock Off, Leech Seed, Reflect, and Light Screen. Limitations include a below-average Special Attack stat, a lack of diverse coverage beyond Hidden Power, vulnerability to common attacking types like Ice, Fire, and Flying, and being outpaced by faster Pokemon like Weavile and Mega Alakazam. Additionally, its reliance on Leaf Storm makes it vulnerable to Pressure users like Zapdos, and it must choose between Hidden Power Fire or Rock, leaving it walled by specific threats.
How does a White-Striped Basculin evolve into Basculegion?
A White-Striped Basculin evolves into Basculegion when it is leveled up after losing at least 294 HP from recoil damage without fainting.
What is the Strawberry ingredient used for in Generation IX?
Strawberry, also known as Strawberry Slice in Japanese, is an ingredient introduced in Generation IX that can be used to make sandwiches.
What role does Aromatisse play in competitive play and what are its key supporting moves?

Aromatisse serves as a bulky Fairy-type that checks Fighting-types like Gallade. It provides essential team support through the moves Wish for healing teammates and Heal Bell for cleric support. It also uses Toxic to cripple foes like Gigalith and Charizard, or Calm Mind for offensive presence. Its ability, Aroma Veil, is notable for granting immunity to Taunt and Encore.
How is a Pokémon designated as OU in the XY format?

In the XY OU format, a Pokémon is designated as OU if it is not an Uber and makes up at least approximately 3.41% of the total weighted usage in the tier. This threshold ensures that a typical competitive player is more than 50% likely to encounter that Pokémon at least once in a given day of 20 battles.
What makes Throh a viable competitor to Gurdurr in competitive play?

Throh distinguishes itself from Gurdurr through its higher Speed, superior special bulk, and the ability to viably run Leftovers for passive recovery. Additionally, Throh features a unique combination of the Mold Breaker ability and Storm Throw, which allows it to ignore Defense boosts and bypass common checks like Tangela and Pyukumuku, making it particularly effective against balance and stall teams.
What is the primary role of Zoroark in competitive play and how does its Illusion ability support this?

Zoroark functions as a niche wallbreaker and an effective lure on bulky offense teams. Its Illusion ability allows it to disguise itself as other Pokemon, such as sweepers like Heracross or passive Pokemon like Qwilfish, which helps it bypass checks like Cofagrigus and Ferroseed that might otherwise wall it.
What is the benefit of running Protective Pads on a Swords Dance Kartana set?

Running Protective Pads on a Swords Dance Kartana set protects it from taking damage or being burned or paralyzed by contact-based abilities like Ferrothorn's Iron Barbs, Heatran's Flame Body, and Zapdos's Static.
What effect does using a Brave Mint have on a Pokémon?
When a Pokémon smells a Brave Mint, its Attack will grow more easily, while its Speed will grow more slowly.
Which specific Pokemon serve as checks or counters to Whimsicott in the BW metagame due to the Sap Sipper ability?
In the BW metagame, the Pokemon that act as checks or counters to Whimsicott due to possessing the Sap Sipper ability include Bouffalant, Miltank, and Sawsbuck.
What is the function of the item known as Profs Letter?
The Profs Letter is an item that can be traded to the player's mother in exchange for a Town Map and a Potion.
What is the primary effect of holding a Wacan Berry in battle?
When a Pokémon holding a Wacan Berry is hit by a super-effective Electric-type attack, the item is consumed to halve the damage taken from that move.
What is the specific purpose of the Key To Room 4 in Pokémon?
The Key To Room 4 is a Pokémon item that is used to unlock the door to Room 4 located inside Sea Mauville.
Why is Stoutland considered a poor choice for a Normal-type attacker in SS ZU?

Stoutland is considered a poor choice because it lost access to Return in this generation, leaving it with weak or unreliable STAB options. It is outclassed by Kangaskhan, Silvally, and Bouffalant, which have better STAB moves, access to boosting moves like Swords Dance, and reliable coverage. Additionally, Stoutland's attempts to use a Scrappy-boosted Last Resort are unreliable, as it requires a turn using the weaker Retaliate and cannot effectively damage common bulky Rock- and Steel-types like Klinklang and Rhydon.
Which tiers are prohibited in the BW PU competitive format?
In the BW PU format, players are prohibited from using Pokémon that belong to the Uber, OU, UUBL, UU, RUBL, RU, NUBL, or NU tiers.
What effect does the Meadow Plate have on the move Judgment and the ability Multitype?

When held by a Pokémon, the Meadow Plate boosts the power of Grass-type moves by 20%. If the holder uses the move Judgment, it becomes a Grass-type move. Additionally, the Multitype ability changes an Arceus holding the Meadow Plate into its Grass-type form.
What is the primary effect of holding a Persim Berry in a Pokémon battle?
When a Pokémon holds a Persim Berry during a battle, it will automatically consume the item to cure itself if it becomes confused.
What are the effects of the Fairy-type move Spirit Break?
Spirit Break is a damage-dealing Fairy-type move that inflicts damage on the target and lowers its Special Attack stat by one stage.
At what level does Darumaka evolve into Darmanitan?
Darumaka evolves into Darmanitan at level 35.
What is the recommended moveset and strategy for using Cetitan as a snow sweeper?

Cetitan functions as a snow sweeper using the ability Slush Rush and the move Belly Drum to boost Attack and Speed. Its moveset includes Icicle Crash as the primary attack, Ice Shard to pick off faster Choice Scarf users, and Earthquake to cover Steel-, Water-, and Fire-types. A Sitrus Berry is recommended to restore HP after using Belly Drum. Because it requires snow, Alolan Ninetales is a mandatory teammate for weather and Aurora Veil support.
What is the function of the Brick Mail item in the Pokémon games?

Brick Mail is a Pokémon item used to send short messages to other players during Pokémon trading. When a Pokémon holds it, the trainer can compose a message using a finite list of words. While a Pokémon is holding this item, it cannot be placed in the PC, and any move that attempts to remove the item from the holder will fail.
What is the secondary effect of the move Stuff Cheeks?
After the user eats its held Berry, the move Stuff Cheeks sharply raises the user's Defense stat.
What are some essential moves for a BW Cobalion competitive set and what specific threats do they address?

Stone Edge is considered essential for Cobalion to hit Zapdos and Victini for super effective damage. Additionally, Hidden Power Ice allows Cobalion to effectively challenge opponents like Flygon and Krookodile.
What move allows Druddigon to hit Ferroseed, Durant, and Escavalier effectively?
Druddigon uses Earthquake to hit Ferroseed, Durant, and Escavalier.
What is the primary effect of holding a Spell Tag in battle?
The Spell Tag is a held item that increases the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves by 20%.
What is the effect of the move After You and does it have any special interaction with Z-Crystals?

After You is a non-damaging Normal-type move that causes the target to move next on the current turn, ignoring priority. It bypasses accuracy checks unless the target is in a semi-invulnerable state. If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-After You, the user's Speed stat is raised by one stage.
What is the secondary effect of the move Core Enforcer?

If the target has already used a move or had a Bag item used on it by its Trainer in the same turn, Core Enforcer suppresses the target's Ability for as long as it remains in battle. However, it cannot suppress specific Abilities such as Multitype, Stance Change, Schooling, Comatose, Shields Down, Disguise, RKS System, Battle Bond, Power Construct, or As One. This effect only occurs if the move successfully lands.
Why is Galvantula considered an effective Sticky Web setter in competitive play?

Galvantula is an effective Sticky Web setter due to its great Speed, good offensive typing, and its ability to threaten common entry hazard removers like Charizard and Eldegoss. Additionally, its access to Volt Switch allows it to function as a decent pivot, and its Compound Eyes ability improves the reliability of Thunder, its strongest STAB move.
What happens if a trainer attempts to use a move to remove a Wave Mail from a Pokémon?
Any move attempting to remove the Wave Mail from a holder will fail.
What happens if a trainer attempts to use a move to remove the Tunnel Mail from a Pokémon?
Any move that attempts to remove the Tunnel Mail from the Pokémon holding it will fail.
What is the base speed stat and the available abilities for Luvdisc?
Luvdisc has a base Speed stat of 97. Its standard ability is Swift Swim, and its hidden ability is Hydration.
What is the purpose of the Whipped Dream item in Pokémon?
The Whipped Dream is a held item introduced in Generation VI that allows Swirlix to evolve into Slurpuff when traded while holding it. The item is consumed during the evolution process.
What is the evolution level for Clauncher, and what are its primary base stats?
Clauncher evolves into Clawitzer starting at level 37. Its base stats are as follows: HP 50, Attack 53, Defense 62, Sp. Atk 58, Sp. Def 63, and Speed 44.
At what level does Ferroseed evolve into Ferrothorn?
Ferroseed evolves into Ferrothorn at level 40.
What is the recommended move set for Simisage and why are specific moves used?

Simisage runs Leaf Storm for its power and ability to force switches, Knock Off to remove items like Eviolite or Leftovers from switch-ins, Superpower to punch through Steel-types and other threats, and Rock Slide for coverage against switch-ins like Dustox and Jumpluff. Gunk Shot is an alternative for breaking bulky Grass-types like Gogoat. Because most coverage is physical and Leaf Storm is naturally strong, it prefers maximum Attack investment.
What are the effects of the Punching Glove item?

The Punching Glove increases the power of punching moves by 10% and prevents the user from making contact with targets when using those moves. Its effects are able to stack with the ability Iron Fist.
What is the specific HP recovery effect of the item Leftovers when held by a Pokémon?
When held by a Pokémon, Leftovers heals the holder by 1/16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn throughout the battle.
What are the base stats for the Virtual Pokémon Porygon-Z?
Porygon-Z has the following base stats: 85 HP, 80 Attack, 70 Defense, 135 Sp. Atk, 75 Sp. Def, and 90 Speed.
Why is a Naive nature preferred over a Hasty nature for Mega Diancie?

A Naive nature is preferred because it allows Mega Diancie to better check threats like Talonflame, Mega Pinsir, and Mega Charizard X. Additionally, this nature ensures it always survives Gliscor's unboosted Earthquake at full HP and Bisharp's +2 Sucker Punch after Stealth Rock damage.
What utility moves make Ogerpon an effective pivot and how do they support its team?

Ogerpon uses Knock Off to provide coverage and remove items from checks like Gholdengo and Galarian Slowking, specifically targeting Heavy-Duty Boots from Pokemon like Dragonite and Moltres. U-turn allows it to maintain momentum and chip checks, while Encore disrupts defensive walls like Gliscor and setup sweepers like Kingambit. These moves enable Ogerpon to act as a reliable pivot and speed control on bulky teams.
How does the power of the move Round change if it is used multiple times during the same turn?

If the move Round has already been used during a turn, its power is doubled for subsequent users. Additionally, if other Pokémon use the move Round during the same turn, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their attacks will be boosted.
What is the primary function of the item HM05?
HM05 is an item used to teach the move Defog to a compatible Pokémon.
What happens when Mega Kick is used as the second move in a Pokémon Contest combination?
When used as the second move in a Pokémon Contest combination, the user gains 4 bonus appeal points if Focus Energy or Mind Reader was used in the previous turn.
What is the effect of the Pokémon item TR65?
TR65 is an item that allows the user to draw power from nature and fire it at the target. Additionally, using this move has the potential to lower the target's Special Defense stat.
What is the function of the Primarium Z held item for Primarina?
The Primarium Z is a crystallized form of Z-Power that, when held by Primarina, allows it to upgrade its Sparkling Aria move into the Z-Move known as Oceanic Operetta.
How does Swoobat function as a sweeper in Terrain, and what item is essential for its setup?

Swoobat functions as a devastating sweeper in Terrain by utilizing the ability Simple and the item Electric Seed. The Electric Seed boosts its Defense upon switching in, improving its physical bulk and providing an immunity to Poltergeist. After one use of Calm Mind and the Electric Seed activation, Swoobat's Stored Power reaches 140 Base Power. Additional moves like Air Slash, Heat Wave, and Roost help it handle threats, maintain health, and set up effectively.
What happens to a Pokémon when it uses the move Belly Drum?
When a Pokémon uses Belly Drum, it sacrifices half of its maximum HP to raise its Attack stat to +6 stages. If the user does not have enough HP to cover this cost, the move will fail.
What are the effects of the move Scorching Sands?
Scorching Sands is a move that inflicts regular damage to the target. Additionally, it has a chance to leave the target with a burn.
Why is Stonjourner considered a poor choice for SS ZU and what is a better alternative?

Stonjourner is a poor choice for SS ZU due to its terrible Special Defense and lackluster Speed. It is recommended to use Lycanroc-N instead, as it offers a superior Speed tier, reliable STAB moves via No Guard, priority in Sucker Punch, and better Fighting-type coverage with Close Combat.
What is the signature move of Melmetal, and what effect does it have on the target?

The signature move of Melmetal is Double Iron Bash. It is a Steel-type multistrike move that hits the target twice per use. Each hit has a 30% chance to cause the target to flinch, resulting in an overall 51% flinch chance. Additionally, if the target has used Minimize, the move deals double damage and bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, provided the target is not in a semi-invulnerable turn.
What is the primary role of Choice Scarf Victini in a competitive match?

Choice Scarf Victini serves as a niche late-game cleaner and revenge killer. It excels at outspeeding threats like Tapu Koko and Mega Lopunny, while using V-create to threaten defensive Pokemon like Ferrothorn and Gholdengo. Its ability to pivot with U-turn or cripple defensive switch-ins like Alomomola and Toxapex with Trick makes it a valuable asset for bulky offense and sun teams.
What is the purpose of the Magnemite Candy item?
The Magnemite Candy is a Pokémon item that is packed with energy; when it is given to certain Pokémon, it increases all of their stats at once.
What is the primary function of the Fishing Rod Galar item?
The Fishing Rod Galar is a Pokémon item that is used by the water to fish up various kinds of Pokémon.
At what level does Naclstack evolve into Garganacl?
Naclstack evolves into Garganacl at level 38.
At what level does Vigoroth evolve into Slaking?
Vigoroth evolves into Slaking starting at level 36.
What special effect does the move Splishy Splash have besides dealing damage?
Splishy Splash has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. Additionally, it is the only Water-type move capable of inflicting paralysis.
What is the primary effect of holding a Normalium Z item?
When held by a Pokémon, a Normalium Z allows the Pokémon to use the Z-move equivalents of its Normal moves. It effectively upgrades the Pokémon's Normal-type moves into powerful Z-Moves.
What is the primary function of the Wailmer Pail in the game?
The Wailmer Pail is a tool used for watering plants and Berries planted in soft soil, which helps promote strong growth and makes the Berries grow more quickly.
What are the base stats for the Bug-type Pokémon Illumise?
Illumise has the following base stats: HP 65, Attack 47, Defense 75, Sp. Atk 73, Sp. Def 85, and Speed 85.
What is the primary function of the move Heart Swap?
Heart Swap is a psychic move that allows the user to swap its stat modifiers with the target Pokémon.
What is the primary function of the Ice Memory item when held by a Silvally?
When held by a Silvally, the Ice Memory item changes the Pokémon to its Ice form and also changes the type of the move Multi-Attack to Ice.
At what level does Buizel evolve into Floatzel?
Buizel evolves into Floatzel at level 26.
How do Heavy-Duty Boots and Jungle Healing contribute to Zarude's performance in competitive battles?

Heavy-Duty Boots allow Zarude to pivot constantly throughout a match without taking damage from entry hazards. Jungle Healing enables Zarude to restore 25% of its health and remove status conditions, such as Toxic from Hippowdon or Will-O-Wisp from Rotom-W, which helps it consistently pivot against defensive Pokemon.
What is the primary role of Chesnaught in the RU tier and how does it support its team?

Chesnaught serves as a premier physical wall and Spikes setter in the RU tier. It supports its team by consistently setting up entry hazards, providing chip damage with Leech Seed and Knock Off, and utilizing the Bulletproof ability for immunities. Additionally, it uses Synthesis for self-healing and can punish pivoters like Cyclizar and Jirachi using a Rocky Helmet.
What effect does the Illuminate Ability have on wild Pokémon encounter rates when placed in the first slot of the party?

If a Pokémon with Illuminate is in the first place in the party, even if it is fainted, the wild Pokémon encounter rate increases by 100%. This trait is shared with the Abilities Arena Trap and No Guard.
What is the item known as the Old Letter?
The Old Letter is a Pokémon item that is described as a letter entrusted to you by a girl to be delivered to a boy, and it appears strangely old.
Where can players find information about the Little Cup metagame or ask questions regarding how to play it?
The LC Information and Questions thread serves as a directory for tips and guides and is a place where players can ask questions about the Little Cup metagame and how to play it.
At what levels does Raboot evolve from Scorbunny and into Cinderace?
Raboot evolves from Scorbunny starting at level 16, and it evolves into Cinderace starting at level 35.
What are the common counters and checks that stop a Volcarona sweep in ORAS OU?

Volcarona's sweeps are shut down by Chansey. It is also walled by bulky Fire- and Dragon-types like Heatran, Volcanion, Mega Charizard X, and Dragonite if it lacks the proper coverage. Additionally, its low bulk makes it vulnerable to priority moves from Talonflame, Mega Pinsir, Crawdaunt, Dragonite, and Bisharp. Stealth Rock also limits its setup opportunities due to its significant weakness to entry hazards.
At what levels does Metang evolve and what are its base stats?
Metang evolves from Beldum at level 20 and evolves into Metagross at level 45. Its base stats are 60 HP, 75 Attack, 100 Defense, 55 Sp. Atk, 80 Sp. Def, and 50 Speed.
What are the side effects of using the Pokémon move Chloroblast?
When using Chloroblast, the user inflicts damage on the target but also takes damage itself and experiences a reduction in its action speed.
What is the recommended Choice Band moveset for a physically oriented Goodra?

For a physically oriented Choice Band set, Goodra should run maximum Attack EVs with an Adamant nature and 44 Speed EVs to outspeed uninvested base 85 Speed Pokemon. Key moves include Outrage as the main STAB attack, Earthquake to hit Steel-types like Mega Aggron, Fire Punch for Whimsicott and Forretress, Superpower for Blissey and Mega Aggron, Power Whip for bulky Water-types, and Iron Tail to cover Fairy-types like Florges and Sylveon.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Grass/Fairy Pokémon Whimsicott?

Whimsicott has the following base stats: 60 HP, 67 Attack, 85 Defense, 77 Sp. Atk, 75 Sp. Def, and 116 Speed. Its primary abilities are Prankster and Infiltrator, with Chlorophyll as its hidden ability.
What is the recommended moveset and strategy for using Reshiram as a stallbreaker?

Reshiram functions as a stallbreaker using Blue Flare as its primary attack, Draco Meteor for coverage against foes resisting Fire, Roost for recovery against threatened Steel-types, and Stone Edge to handle Ho-Oh. It should run maximum Speed with a Naive nature to Speed tie with other base 90s. It performs best on offensive teams supported by entry hazards to soften checks and Groudon to provide sun, Stealth Rock, and utility.
What is the primary role of Liepard on a sun team and which item is required for this strategy?

On a sun team, Liepard acts as an excellent mid-game sun setter due to its Prankster ability combined with the move Sunny Day. To ensure its partners benefit from the sun for as many turns as possible, the item Heat Rock is necessary.
At what level does a Pancham evolve into a Pangoro, and what are its primary types?
Pancham evolves into Pangoro at level 32. Pangoro is a Fighting/Dark type Pokémon.
What are the base stats and primary abilities for the Pokémon Sunflora?

Sunflora has the following base stats: HP 75, Attack 75, Defense 55, Sp. Atk 105, Sp. Def 85, and Speed 30. Its primary abilities are Chlorophyll and Solar Power, and its hidden ability is Early Bird.
What is the recommended EV spread for a Zygarde utilizing Coil and Substitute in the OU tier, and what is the reasoning behind it?

Zygarde should run 56 Speed EVs to outspeed Bisharp and hit it with Earthquake before being hit by Knock Off. The remaining EVs are invested into maximizing special bulk, with enough HP to create 101 HP Substitutes that can withstand two Seismic Tosses. Maximum Special Defense helps protect the Substitute from weaker special attacks like Mega Venusaur's Giga Drain, while Coil is used to bolster Defense.
What is Zekrom's role in the Ubers metagame and what item is recommended to help it function as a revenge killer?

Zekrom is a powerful force in the Ubers metagame due to its high Attack stat and excellent STAB combination. Because its base 90 Speed is insufficient to outpace key threats like Arceus, Latios, Latias, and Mewtwo, it is recommended to equip it with a Choice Scarf to help it function effectively as a revenge killer. Its immunity to paralysis also enhances its capability in this role.
What is the primary effect of the Super Luck ability in Pokémon?
The Super Luck ability increases the critical-hit ratios of a Pokémon's moves by one stage higher than normal.
Why is Koraidon considered a near-obligatory partner for Flutter Mane in competitive Ubers?

Koraidon is an essential partner for Flutter Mane because it sets up sun, which activates Flutter Mane's Protosynthesis ability. Additionally, Koraidon provides valuable pivoting support, safely bringing Flutter Mane onto the field against Pokemon it can effectively threaten.
How does Cobalion perform as a Stealth Rock user in competitive play, and what moves complement its role?

Cobalion is one of the fastest Stealth Rock users, making it an excellent choice for offensive teams. Complementary moves include Close Combat for high-powered STAB damage, Volt Switch for team momentum, and Iron Head for coverage against Fairy-types. Alternatively, Taunt can shut down setup sweepers and prevent hazards, while Thunder Wave provides team support.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Ice-type Pokémon Cetitan?
Cetitan has base stats of 170 HP, 113 Attack, 65 Defense, 45 Sp. Atk, 55 Sp. Def, and 73 Speed. Its primary abilities are Thick Fat and Slush Rush, while its hidden ability is Sheer Force.
What moveset and EV strategy makes Arboliva an effective wallbreaker?

Arboliva uses Hyper Voice, Leaf Storm, Earth Power, and Alluring Voice to secure OHKOs or 2HKOs. It utilizes Tera Fairy to improve survivability against Fighting-types like Passimian and Virizion. Its EV spread is specifically designed to outspeed Regirock and Weezing, allowing it to threaten them before it takes super-effective damage. This offensive set is supported by pivot teammates and entry hazard setters to pressure defensive walls.
What is the function of the Solganium Z item?
The Solganium Z item converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Solgaleo’s Sunsteel Strike into an exclusive Z-Move.
What is the function of the Utility Umbrella item in Pokémon?
The Utility Umbrella is a held item that protects the Pokémon holding it from the effects of both rain and harsh sunlight.
What is the primary typing and base stat total for the Poison Pin Pokémon, Poipole?
Poipole is a Poison-type Pokémon. Its base stats are as follows: HP 67, Attack 73, Defense 67, Sp. Atk 73, Sp. Def 67, and Speed 73.
What are the primary types and base stats for the Legendary Pokémon Tapu Fini?
Tapu Fini is a Water/Fairy type Pokémon with the following base stats: 70 HP, 75 Attack, 115 Defense, 95 Special Attack, 130 Special Defense, and 85 Speed.
What happens when two Luvdisc kiss, according to the show?
When two Luvdisc kiss, they are able to use their slender bodies as wings to fly for short periods of time.
What is the primary function of the Sparkling Stone in the Alola region?
The Sparkling Stone is a Pokémon item that is required to obtain a Z-Ring.
What is the primary effect of holding a Sharp Beak in a Pokémon battle?
The Sharp Beak is a hold item that increases the power of the holder's Flying-type moves by 20%.
What is the primary function of the Xtransceiver Red item?
The Xtransceiver Red is a high-tech transceiver that features a camera function and allows users to conduct up to four-way calls.
What is the Green Bell Pepper used for in Generation IX?
The Green Bell Pepper, also known as Bell Pepper Slice in Japanese, is an ingredient introduced in Generation IX that can be used to make sandwiches.
What is the primary function of the Heracronite held item in Pokémon games?

The Heracronite is a Mega Stone that allows Heracross to Mega Evolve into Mega Heracross, provided the Trainer possesses a Key Stone. It is unaffected by item-negating effects like Embargo or Klutz, and cannot be removed or given to a Heracross using item-manipulating effects such as Trick or Fling.
How does the move Mirror Move function in a battle?

Mirror Move uses the last move targeted at the user by a Pokémon currently on the field. It succeeds even if the original move missed, failed, or was blocked. However, it cannot copy field-targeting moves or specific categories of moves like assist moves or meta moves, in which case the move will fail if no other appropriate move is available to copy.
What happens if a trainer tries to use a move to remove a Tropic Mail from a Pokémon?
Any move that attempts to remove the Tropic Mail from the Pokémon holding it will fail.
What is Nihilego's role on Poison teams, and which Pokémon serve as good teammates to handle its checks?

Nihilego functions as an effective Choice Scarf user on Poison teams. Teammates include Nidoking, which removes Steel-type walls; Sneasler, which breaks special walls like Blissey; Mega Venusaur, which manages Water- and Ground-type threats; Crobat, which provides a Ground immunity; Alolan Muk, which traps Psychic- and Ghost-type threats with Pursuit; and Galarian Slowking, which provides safe entry via Chilly Reception.
What happens when you use the move Shattered Psyche Physical?

Shattered Psyche Physical inflicts regular damage by having the user control the target with its Z-Power and hurting the target with full force. Its power varies depending on the original move used. Note that this move cannot be used and it is recommended that it be forgotten, as it cannot be remembered once it is.
What is the effect of the Grim Neigh ability in Pokémon?
The Grim Neigh ability causes the Pokémon to receive a boost to its Sp. Atk stat whenever it successfully knocks out a target.
What are the base stats and primary type of the Pokemon Pyukumuku?
Pyukumuku is a Water-type Pokemon. Its base stats are: 55 HP, 60 Attack, 130 Defense, 30 Special Attack, 130 Special Defense, and 5 Speed.
What is the recommended item and role for Nasty Plot Salazzle in the PU tier?

Nasty Plot Salazzle serves as a threatening setup sweeper and wallbreaker in the PU tier. The recommended item is Focus Sash, which helps Salazzle set up more easily and secure KOs, while also allowing it to act as an emergency check to threats like Shift Gear Toxtricity; however, it should primarily be used on hyper offense teams to avoid entry hazards breaking the sash.
What are the common counters for Beheeyem in the PU tier?

Walls like Scraggy and Bronzor can counter Beheeyem regardless of the set chosen. Other Pokemon, such as Audino and Shiftry, can also serve as reasonable counters depending on which specific set Beheeyem is running.
What is Inteleon's role in the NU tier and what specific strategy can it use to bypass defensive checks?

Inteleon serves as a wallbreaker and pivot in the NU tier, utilizing its high Speed and access to U-turn to punish teams lacking solid Water-type checks. To break through defensive answers, Inteleon can employ a specific combination of the move Focus Energy, the item Scope Lens, and its ability Sniper to land powerful critical hits.
What is Goodra's role in the SS metagame and what item does it typically use to support that role?

Goodra functions as a dangerous wallbreaker thanks to its solid Special Attack and wide move coverage. It typically runs an Expert Belt to increase its power against the many Pokemon it hits super effectively, which allows it to dismantle defensive cores, though this choice limits its ability to break through specially bulky Pokemon like Umbreon, Snorlax, and Reuniclus.
What are the base stats and primary abilities of the Water/Ground type Pokémon Quagsire?
Quagsire has base stats of 95 HP, 85 Attack, 85 Defense, 65 Sp. Atk, 65 Sp. Def, and 35 Speed. Its primary abilities are Damp and Water Absorb, while its hidden ability is Unaware.
What is the effect of the Pokémon item Tm00?
The item Tm00 allows the target to be slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.
What is the primary effect of the Roto Prize Money item?
Roto Prize Money is a type of Rotom Power that triples the amount of prize money a player receives after winning a Pokémon battle.
What is the primary function of the Secret Potion item?
The Secret Potion is used to cure the chronic headaches of the Psyducks blocking Route 210, and it can also fully heal a Pokémon of any ailment.
What is a unique characteristic of the Pokémon move Leaf Blade?
Leaf Blade is a move that inflicts regular damage and features a high critical-hit ratio, meaning the user's critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
What are the common weaknesses and playstyle considerations for Brute Bonnet in the ZU tier?

Brute Bonnet suffers from a poor defensive typing with weaknesses to Fighting, Bug, Ice, and Poison-type attacks. Its slow Speed tier makes it reliant on the move Sucker Punch to threaten offensive teams. Additionally, its Choice Band set can be countered by Pokemon like Dipplin, Virizion, and Charizard. While it can use Terastallization to overcome some of these issues, it often makes the standard offensive set Tera-dependent.
What are the base stats of the Blast Turtle Pokémon, Turtonator?
Turtonator has the following base stats: HP 60, Attack 78, Defense 135, Sp. Atk 91, Sp. Def 85, and Speed 36.
What effect does the Swift Swim ability have on a Pokémon?
Swift Swim is an ability that doubles a Pokémon's Speed during rain. This speed boost does not count as a stat modifier.
What is the effect of the Burn Drive item when held by Genesect?
When the Burn Drive is held by Genesect, its buster color turns red, and it changes the Techno Blast move to a Fire-type move.
How many times can the move Comet Punch hit during a single turn?
Comet Punch hits 2–5 times in one turn. It has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times, averaging to 3 hits per use.
What happens if a Pokémon with a Choice item is taunted while only knowing status moves?
If a Pokémon that only knows status moves is taunted, or is taunted after using a status move while holding a Choice item, it will be forced to use Struggle.
What is Solgaleo's niche in the Ubers tier and what moves help it fulfill this role?

Solgaleo functions in Ubers as a defensive Steel-type that cannot be trapped by Magnezone, allowing it to check threats like Xerneas and Eternatus. Its competitive niche is defined by the combination of Future Sight and Teleport. Future Sight provides chip damage against targets like Eternatus and Buzzwole to help wallbreakers, while Teleport allows Solgaleo to safely bring in frail teammates. Sunsteel Strike is also required to effectively check Xerneas.
What is the primary role and strategy for Braviary in XY competitive play?

Braviary acts as a potent stallbreaker that uses its high Attack and 101 HP Substitutes to pressure defensive teams. Its recommended set utilizes Bulk Up for stat boosts, Roost for recovery, Brave Bird for STAB damage, and Substitute. It carries Leftovers and Defiant to punish Intimidate or Defoggers. The EV spread focuses on maximum HP to create 101 HP Substitutes, speed to outpace uninvested Golbat, and Special Defense to handle defensive threats like Jellicent.
What are the base stats of the Mythical Pokémon Genesect?
Genesect has a base HP of 71, Attack of 120, Defense of 95, Sp. Atk of 120, Sp. Def of 95, and Speed of 99.
What are some of the main checks and counters to Reuniclus in competitive play?

Reuniclus can struggle against Dark- and Ghost-type Pokemon, including Incineroar, Guzzlord, Golurk, and Chandelure. Furthermore, while an Assault Vest set helps answer strong special attackers like Raikou and Xurkitree, it becomes extremely vulnerable to the move Knock Off, which diminishes its defensive effectiveness.
What is the base stat distribution for the Mythical Pokémon Manaphy?
Manaphy has a base stat total of 100 in every category, including HP, Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed.
Why is it generally discouraged to use Gourgeist instead of Gourgeist-S in competitive play?

Gourgeist is considered inferior to Gourgeist-S because its lower Speed causes it to be outpaced by threats like Sawk, the Silvally formes, and Rotom. While Gourgeist offers slightly higher HP and Attack, these stats fail to reach any noteworthy benchmarks, and its niche Weakness Policy set is less effective because it remains slower than Choice Scarf users even after a boost.
Why is Mr. Rime considered unviable in competitive play?

Mr. Rime is considered unviable because it lacks support moves and has a mediocre Speed tier, causing it to be outclassed by other entry hazard removers like Cryogonal and Articuno. Furthermore, Jynx is preferred as an offensive special attacker due to its superior Speed, power, and access to moves like Nasty Plot and Lovely Kiss.
What is the primary effect of using a Health Candy on a Pokémon?
When a Health Candy is given to a Pokémon, it increases that Pokémon's HP.
What kind of damage does the move Leafage inflict?
Leafage is a Pokémon move that inflicts regular damage.
What are the secondary effects of using the Fire-type move Inferno?

Inferno deals damage and always burns the target if it hits. Additionally, when used in a Contest Spectacular combination, it causes Hex to give an extra three appeal points if used in the following turn.
What role does Ting-Lu play in competitive play and what are its primary weaknesses?

Ting-Lu serves as a premier special wall and reliable entry hazard setter and phazer due to its fantastic bulk, typing, and Vessel of Ruin ability. Its primary weaknesses include a lack of reliable recovery outside of Rest, which makes it reliant on Leftovers and susceptible to chip damage and Knock Off. It can be countered by Taunt users, Magic Bounce users, bulky Water-types, and specific coverage moves like Will-O-Wisp or Solar Beam.
What is the purpose of a Pink Apricorn in the game?
A Pink Apricorn is a Pokémon item that can be given to Kurt in Azalea Town to produce a Love Ball.
What happens to Goomy if its body dries out?
If Goomy's body dries out, it becomes unable to breathe and will die. Because of this, it stays in damp, shady areas to maintain its moisture.
What roles does Noivern fill in the RarelyUsed tier and which moves help it perform them?

Noivern functions as an effective revenge killer and stallbreaker due to its high Speed and access to Taunt and Roost. Taunt prevents setup from threats like Barbaracle and disrupts defensive Pokemon like Mantine, while Roost helps maintain health. Its fourth moveslot is customizable, offering options like U-turn for pivoting, Super Fang for chip damage against bulky switch-ins, and coverage moves like Flamethrower and Draco Meteor.
How should I EV train Dhelmise to maximize its performance, and what is the reasoning behind these stats?

You should run an Adamant nature with maximum Attack investment to hit as hard as possible. You should also invest 204 EVs into Speed, which allows Dhelmise to outspeed Vaporeon, while the remaining EVs are placed into HP to increase its overall bulk.
What is the effect of the Pokémon move Tar Shot?
Tar Shot causes the target to have its Speed stat lowered and makes the target become weaker to Fire-type moves.
What is the primary role of Tapu Fini in competitive play and what are its key vulnerabilities?

Tapu Fini is a defensive Pokémon that checks offensive threats like Urshifu-R, Buzzwole, and Weavile while providing support through Misty Terrain and utility moves like Trick and Taunt. Its main vulnerability is a lack of reliable recovery; it must rely on Leftovers, as Draining Kiss is weak and Rest is blocked by its own Misty Terrain. This makes it susceptible to being worn down, and it struggles against threats like Rillaboom, Kartana, and Tapu Koko.
What roles does Eternatus play in the Ubers tier, and what are its key defensive capabilities?

Eternatus acts as a top-tier threat in Ubers, serving as a premier check to Kyogre and Yveltal, as well as a soft check to Ho-Oh and Marshadow. It provides role compression, reliable recovery, and acts as a poison spreader. Defensively, it relies on its bulk and typing, though it is vulnerable to Psychic-, Ground-, Ice-, and Dragon-type moves. Its special wall set utilizes moves like Flamethrower to hit Steel-types and Sludge Bomb to check Xerneas.
What is the secondary effect of the Max Move Max Darkness?
When used, Max Darkness inflicts damage and lowers the Special Defense of the target and its ally by one stage.
What is the recommended item and EV spread for Hydrapple, and why are they used?

Hydrapple should use Heavy-Duty Boots to avoid entry hazard damage and improve the effectiveness of its Regenerator ability. The recommended EV spread is maximum HP and 92 Defense, which allows it to avoid being 2HKOed by Choice Specs Keldeo's Secret Sword and makes it more resilient against physical attackers like Scizor, Lokix, Zarude, Ogerpon-C, and Excadrill, enabling it to set up Nasty Plot more effectively.
What is the specific use of Poison Tera Shards in Pokémon Generation IX?

Poison Tera Shards are used to change a Pokémon's Tera Type to Poison. By collecting 50 of these shards, a player can visit the Treasure Eatery in Medali to perform this change, with the exception of the Pokémon Ogerpon and Terapagos.
What move is taught by the Pokémon item TM77?
TM77 is a Pokémon item that teaches the move Psych Up to a compatible Pokémon.
What is the recommended moveset and purpose for Aromatisse in the RU tier?

Aromatisse serves as a late-game setup sweeper and defensive cleric in RU. Its moveset includes Calm Mind for stat boosting, Moonblast for STAB damage, Rest for recovery, and Sleep Talk to remain active while asleep. It utilizes Leftovers and a physically bulky EV spread with 12 Speed EVs to outpace uninvested Slowking. Its Aroma Veil ability provides immunity to Taunt and Encore, allowing it to reliably perform its supportive and offensive roles.
Why is Beartic considered to be outclassed by other wallbreakers like Piloswine, Sawk, and Lycanroc-N?

Beartic is outclassed because of its horrific defensive utility, low Speed, and extreme vulnerability to residual damage. While Piloswine has lower Attack, it is superior due to its greater bulk, Ground typing, and Stealth Rock access. Sawk and Lycanroc-N outclass Beartic because they provide comparable power while benefiting from better typings and greater Speed.
What is the function of the Sablenite item in a Pokémon battle?
The Sablenite is a Mega Stone that, when held by Sableye, enables it to Mega Evolve during battle.
What effect does the move Final Gambit have on the user?
When a Pokémon uses the move Final Gambit, it inflicts damage to the target equal to the user's remaining HP and then the user faints.
What is the primary role of Lurantis in competitive play, and which moves allow it to avoid being passive?

Lurantis functions as a utility choice and Defog user, capable of removing entry hazards from the field. It avoids being passive by utilizing the ability Contrary in combination with the moves Leaf Storm and Superpower; Leaf Storm boosts its Special Attack, while Superpower increases its Defense, allowing it to threaten opponents despite its defensive focus.
What are the main drawbacks of using Tornadus in competitive play?

Tornadus suffers from below-average bulk at 79 / 70 / 80, a weakness to Stealth Rock, and being outsped by common UU threats like Mega Beedrill, Crobat, and Mega Aerodactyl. Additionally, its most powerful special moves, Hurricane and Focus Blast, are unreliable due to their low accuracy.
What is the specific effect of holding the Silver Powder item during a Pokémon battle?
When held by a Pokémon during battle, the Silver Powder item boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves by 1.2 times.
What is the primary benefit of using a Wing Ball compared to a Feather Ball?
A Wing Ball is an item that can be thrown further than a Feather Ball and is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.
How many times can Fury Attack hit a target, and what is the effect of the Skill Link ability on this move?
Fury Attack hits the target 2-5 times per use. Pokémon with the Ability Skill Link will always hit five times when using Fury Attack, provided the move does not miss.
What is the primary role and advantage of using a Dragon Dance Necrozma in competitive play?

Dragon Dance Necrozma functions as a strong setup sweeper. It uses its excellent movepool to power through traditional defensive answers like Hisuian Goodra and Umbreon. Its move Photon Geyser allows it to break through Unaware Pokemon like Quagsire and disregard Mimikyu's Disguise, while Earthquake provides super effective damage against Steel-types such as Empoleon, Hisuian Goodra, and Jirachi, and X-Scissor handles Dark- and Psychic-types like Krookodile and Umbreon.
How is damage calculated when a Pokémon uses the move Psyshock?
Psyshock inflicts regular damage, and its damage calculation always uses the target's Defense stat, regardless of the move's damage class.
What is the function of the Medal Box item?
The Medal Box is a box-shaped machine designed to store Medals and information regarding those Medals.
What is the recommended moveset and EV spread for an offensive Pangoro in the ORAS UU tier?

Pangoro should utilize maximum Attack investment with an Adamant nature. Its moveset includes Hammer Arm as the primary STAB move, Knock Off for coverage against Fighting-resistant Pokemon, Gunk Shot to threaten Fairy-types like Sylveon and Florges, and Parting Shot to gain momentum. Alternatively, Drain Punch can be used as a more reliable STAB move that provides HP recovery.
What is the function of Data Card 27 in the context of the Pokéathlon?
Data Card 27 is an item used to record and display the total amount of time a player has spent participating in the Pokéathlon, as well as holding various Pokéathlon records.
What effect does the move Max Airstream have on a team's stats?
Max Airstream is a Flying-type attack used by Dynamax Pokémon that inflicts regular damage and raises the Speed stats of the user's ally Pokémon.
Why is Gumshoos generally considered inferior to other Normal-type wallbreakers like Stoutland or Dodrio?

Gumshoos is considered outclassed due to its low Speed and mediocre defenses, which make it easy to revenge kill. Competitors like Stoutland have better bulk and access to Scrappy, while Dodrio offers a higher Speed tier, a secondary Flying typing, and priority moves, making them more consistent options.
What is the function of the black membrane surrounding Krokorok's eyes?

The black membrane surrounding Krokorok's eyes serves to protect them from sandstorms. Additionally, it acts as a thermal detector, allowing Krokorok to see the temperature of different objects and providing it with exceptional night vision, which helps it hunt in the dark.
What is the primary effect of the move Silk Trap, and what happens if it successfully blocks a contact move?

Silk Trap is a non-damaging Bug-type move that protects the user from all physical and special moves during the turn it is used. If the move successfully blocks an attack that makes contact, the attacker's Speed stat is lowered by one stage.
How much recoil damage does the user take when using the move Brave Bird?
When using Brave Bird, the user takes 1/3 of the damage it inflicts as recoil damage.
What is the primary function of a Golden Nanab Berry when used on a wild Pokémon?
The Golden Nanab Berry is a Pokémon item used to drastically calm a wild Pokémon that you are attempting to catch.
At what level does Carvanha evolve into Sharpedo, and what are its base Attack and Speed stats?
Carvanha evolves into Sharpedo at level 30. It has a base Attack stat of 90 and a base Speed stat of 65.
What roles can Crustle perform in the PU metagame and what makes it a viable hazard-stacking lead?

In the PU tier, Crustle functions as both a threatening sweeper with Shell Smash and a reliable hazard-stacking lead. It excels as a lead because its Sturdy ability ensures it can reliably set up Stealth Rock and Spikes. Crustle distinguishes itself from competitors like Smeargle, Golem, and Rampardos by combining offensive pressure, access to both Stealth Rock and Spikes, and the ability to utilize a Custap Berry.
At what levels does Solosis evolve into its subsequent forms?
Solosis evolves into Duosion starting at level 32, and Duosion evolves into Reuniclus starting at level 41.
What are the specific effects of the Pokémon ability Comatose?

The Comatose ability causes a Pokémon to act as though it is permanently asleep, meaning it can attack without waking up. Additionally, the Pokémon cannot be afflicted with other status ailments, is unaffected by the move Yawn, and can successfully use the move Sleep Talk.
At what level does Trubbish evolve into Garbodor?
Trubbish evolves into Garbodor at level 36.
What is the function of the item Groundium Z in a Pokémon's bag?
Groundium Z is an item that converts Z-Power into crystals, which allows a Pokémon to upgrade its Ground-type moves into powerful Ground-type Z-Moves.
What is the recommended moveset and playstyle for a Choice Band Urshifu-S?

Choice Band Urshifu-S runs Wicked Blow, Close Combat, U-turn, and either Stone Edge or Ice Punch. Wicked Blow exploits Unseen Fist to hit through Protect and Defense boosts, while Close Combat covers Dark-resistant foes like Yveltal and Zacian-C. U-turn provides momentum, while Stone Edge or Ice Punch offer coverage. A Jolly nature is preferred to outspeed targets like Kyogre and Zekrom, though Adamant is an option for more power.
What are Drizzile's base stats and at what levels does its evolution chain occur?

Drizzile has base stats of 65 HP, 60 Attack, 55 Defense, 95 Sp. Atk, 55 Sp. Def, and 90 Speed. Its evolution chain begins with Sobble, which evolves into Drizzile at level 16, and then into Inteleon at level 35.
How does the move Clear Smog interact with a target's stat levels?
Clear Smog inflicts damage and resets all of the target's stat levels to 0, which includes both positive and negative stat changes.
What is the secondary effect of the move Mystical Fire?
Mystical Fire inflicts regular damage and has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Attack stat by one stage.
What are the base stats of the Psychic-type Pokémon Musharna?
Musharna has the following base stats: HP 116, Attack 55, Defense 85, Sp. Atk 107, Sp. Def 95, and Speed 29.
What is the effect of the Hospitality ability in Pokémon?
When a Pokémon with the Hospitality ability enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, which restores a small amount of that ally's HP.
What is the base Special Attack stat of the Paradox Pokémon Iron Jugulis?
Iron Jugulis has a base Special Attack stat of 122.
What is Iron Bundle's primary role in the Ubers tier and how does it maintain its effectiveness?

Iron Bundle serves as a top speed control option in Ubers due to its high base 135 Speed. It uses Hydro Pump and Freeze-Dry for perfect coverage, with Ice Beam to hit threats like Koraidon and Miraidon. It utilizes Heavy-Duty Boots to mitigate entry hazard damage, allowing it to repeatedly enter the field. Taunt helps shut down defensive walls and hazards, while Tera Ghost can be used to gain immunities to Extreme Speed and Fighting-type moves.
At what level does Cubchoo evolve into Beartic, and what are its base stats?
Cubchoo evolves into Beartic at level 37. Its base stats are as follows: HP 55, Attack 70, Defense 40, Sp. Atk 60, Sp. Def 40, and Speed 40.
What is the purpose of the Oaks Letter item in the game?
The Oaks Letter is a Pokémon item that grants the player access to Flower Paradise and the Pokémon Shaymin.
What is the effect of holding a Strawberry Sweet for a Milcery?
When a Milcery holds a Strawberry Sweet, it will spin around happily.
At what level does Wooloo evolve into Dubwool?
Wooloo evolves into Dubwool at level 24.
What are some of Ribombee's support options and why is it considered a frail Pokémon?

Ribombee can provide support through moves like Sticky Web, Tailwind, and Defog. Despite a decent Bug/Fairy defensive typing, it is considered very frail, meaning it can only switch into passive walls or weak resisted hits. Most strong attacks, even those it resists, are likely to 2HKO it.
What are the base stats of the Rock-type Pokemon Sudowoodo?
Sudowoodo has the following base stats: HP 70, Attack 100, Defense 115, Sp. Atk 30, Sp. Def 65, and Speed 30.
What is the recommended moveset and EV spread for a competitive Meloetta in the RU tier?

Meloetta's recommended moveset includes Substitute, Calm Mind, Psyshock, and Focus Blast. The EV spread uses maximum HP to increase bulk and prevent Substitutes from breaking to Seismic Toss, 48 Speed EVs with a Timid nature to outspeed Adamant Absol and Choice Specs Exploud, and the remainder in Defense. Leftovers is the preferred item to recover HP lost from using Substitute.
How does the Dry Skin ability interact with Water-type moves and Fire-type moves?

When a Pokémon with Dry Skin is hit by a Water-type move, the move has no effect and the Pokémon restores one quarter of its maximum HP. Conversely, Fire-type attacks deal 25% more damage to a Pokémon with this ability.
What is the primary use of a Bluk Berry in the context of Pokéblocks?
The Bluk Berry is used to make Pokéblocks that are intended to enhance a Pokémon's Beauty stat.
What is the primary utility of a Magost Berry in the Pokémon games?

Magost Berries cannot be used directly. They are primarily used as ingredients, such as for crafting Pokéblocks and Poffins. They can also be exchanged for items like accessories, Décor, or Stickers at specific locations in various games, or sold to the gourmet maniac on Route 5 in Generation V games.
What are some of the primary checks and counters for a Bulk Up Braviary in SM competitive play?

Bulk Up Braviary can be checked defensively by Pokemon such as Rhydon and Steelix. Additionally, because it has lower Speed, faster offensive threats like Heliolisk and Mega Glalie can easily take advantage of it and OHKO it.
What is the effect of using a Naughty Mint on a Pokémon's stats?

When used from the Bag, a Naughty Mint changes the effect of a Pokémon's Nature on its stats to that of the Naughty Nature, which increases the Pokémon's Attack stat and decreases its Special Defense stat.
What is the recommended build for Stoutland in the PU tier to maximize its offensive output?

To maximize its damage, Stoutland should run maximum Attack investment, a Choice Band, and an Adamant nature. This build allows it to hit as hard as possible, utilizing its STAB moves like Return and coverage options such as Superpower, Crunch, and Pursuit.
How should a defensive Sylveon be configured and what is its role on a team?

A defensive Sylveon utilizes Wish and Protect to provide reliable recovery and scouting. It functions as a cleric with Heal Bell to remove Toxic poison, or can run Mystical Fire for coverage against Steel- and Poison-types like Vileplume and Escavalier. Recommended items include Leftovers for passive recovery or Heavy-Duty Boots to mitigate entry hazard damage. Its EV investment is designed to avoid a 2HKO from Life Orb Starmie while maintaining bulk to switch into attackers like Passimian.
What is the secondary effect of the move Night Daze, and how does it function during standard gameplay?
Night Daze is a damage-dealing Dark-type move that has a 40% chance of lowering the target's accuracy by one stage.
What is the effect of holding a Tanga Berry during a battle?

If a Pokémon holding a Tanga Berry is hit by a super-effective Bug-type attack, it will consume the Berry to halve the damage of that move. If the holder has the Ripen ability, the damage is instead multiplied by 1/4.
At what level does Drifloon evolve into Drifblim?
Drifloon evolves into Drifblim at level 28.
What are some of the primary checks and counters to Guzzlord in the RU tier?

Guzzlord is significantly threatened by common Fighting-type Pokemon such as Bewear, Heracross, and Lucario. Additionally, it can be a liability against certain Psychic-type setup sweepers like Reuniclus, Cosmic Power Metagross, and Psycho Shift Sigilyph, which can absorb Knock Off damage and set up on it.
What is the recommended Nasty Plot moveset for Beheeyem and its intended role?

Beheeyem functions as a wallbreaker using Nasty Plot, Psychic, Signal Beam or Thunderbolt, and Recover. Key items include Colbur Berry to handle Dark-types or Leftovers for recovery. The EV spread consists of 248 HP, 236 Defense, and 24 Special Attack with a Modest nature. Analytic is the preferred ability to capitalize on its low speed. This set is designed to break through defensively oriented teams by boosting Special Attack to high levels.
What is the secondary effect of the move Chilling Water?
When the user performs the move Chilling Water, it lowers the target's Attack stat in addition to dealing damage.
What are the effects of the Flower Veil ability in a Pokémon battle?
Flower Veil protects ally Grass-type Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon. Additionally, it protects these ally Grass-type Pokémon from being affected by status conditions.
How much HP does the move Wish restore and when does it take effect?
Wish restores up to half of the user's maximum HP. This effect occurs at the end of the next turn after the move is used, healing either the user or its replacement if the user switches out.
How many times can the move Fury Attack hit during a single turn?
Fury Attack hits 2 to 5 times in a single turn. It has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times, resulting in an average of 3 hits per use.
What role does Cobalion fill on a team and what are its key utility options?

Cobalion acts as a role compression option for bulky offense and balance teams. Its key utility options include setting Stealth Rock to chip down switch-ins, using Toxic to cripple checks like Hippowdon and Salamence, and using Volt Switch to gain momentum against checks like Galarian Slowbro.
What is the effect of the Misty Surge ability when a Pokémon enters battle?
When a Pokémon with the Misty Surge ability enters the battle, it creates the effect of the move Misty Terrain on the battlefield.
What is the function of the Mega Glasses item in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire?

The Mega Glasses are an item containing an untold power that enables a Pokémon carrying a Mega Stone to Mega Evolve during battle. Although they function as Maxie’s Key Stone in Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire, they are considered an unused item and cannot be obtained by the player.
How does Tinkatuff acquire the metal needed to build its hammer?

Tinkatuff collects metal by preying on groups of Pawniard and Bisharp. Additionally, it is known to visit human settlements, traveling through factories and warehouses to gather the necessary materials.
Why is Pyroar considered ineffective in the NU tier despite its high Speed?

Pyroar struggles in the NU tier because it has poor non-STAB coverage, minimal defensive utility, and bad bulk. It relies heavily on Grassium Z and Solar Beam to handle checks like Rhydon and Slowking, whereas other Fire-types like Incineroar and Magmortar offer more consistent coverage and better defensive traits, such as Intimidate or higher Special Defense.
What is unique about Klawf's ability Anger Shell?
Klawf is the only known Pokémon that is capable of having Anger Shell as an Ability.
What is the primary effect of holding a Poisonium Z in battle?
The Poisonium Z is a held item that allows a Pokémon to upgrade its Poison-type moves into their corresponding Z-Move equivalents.
What is the primary role of the Calm Mind move on Reuniclus in XY, and why is Psyshock often preferred over Psychic?

Calm Mind is used to boost Reuniclus's Special Attack and Special Defense, complementing its natural bulk and offenses. Psyshock is the preferred primary STAB move because it allows Reuniclus to win Calm Mind wars against opponents like Suicune and Cresselia and provides superior damage output against Florges and Blissey compared to Psychic.
What happens to the user's Defense and Special Defense stats when they use the move Stockpile?

When a Pokémon uses Stockpile, it gains a secondary effect that raises both its Defense and Special Defense stats by one stage each. However, if the user subsequently uses the moves Spit Up or Swallow, these increases to the Defense and Special Defense stats are lost.
What is the evolution level of Lycanroc from Rockruff, and what are its base Attack and Speed stats?
Lycanroc evolves from Rockruff at level 25. Its base Attack stat is 115, and its base Speed stat is 112.
What is the recommended team support for a competitive Hawlucha, and how do these teammates assist its performance?

Hawlucha should always be used alongside Tapu Koko or Rillaboom. Their abilities set up specific terrains that trigger Hawlucha's held item—Electric Seed or Grassy Seed—which provides a Defense boost and activates the Unburden ability. This activation grants Hawlucha a significant Speed boost, allowing it to function as a formidable late-game cleaner.
What is the signature Ability of Minior, and how does it affect its form?

The signature Ability of Minior is Shields Down. Minior changes into its Meteor Form at the start of battle or at the end of a turn if its HP is above half, and it changes back into its core form at the end of a turn if its HP is below half. Minior is always in its core form when outside of battle.
What is the function of the Pokémon item Tr04?
Tr04 is a Pokémon item that allows the user to attack everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.
How does the move Bounce work and what are its potential secondary effects?

Bounce is a two-turn move where the user bounces high into the air on the first turn, becoming immune to most attacks, and hits the target on the second turn. The move inflicts regular damage and has a chance to paralyze the target.
What information does the Data Card 22 item track?
The Data Card 22 records the number of times a trainer has come in last or lost across all Pokéathlon events.
What are the specific requirements for a Pancham to evolve into Pangoro?
Pancham evolves into Pangoro starting at level 32, provided that the player has a Dark-type Pokémon in their party.
What is the secondary effect of the move Ice Hammer?
After inflicting regular damage, Ice Hammer lowers the user's Speed stat by one stage.
Which Pokemon can Sigilyph hit for super effective damage using Energy Ball?
Energy Ball allows Sigilyph to hit Slowking, Crawdaunt, Rhydon, and Lanturn for super effective damage.
How much HP does the move Life Dew restore to the user and their allies?
Life Dew is a non-damaging Water-type move that restores the HP of the user and its allies by 25% of their maximum HP.
What is the primary effect of the move Giga Drain?
Giga Drain inflicts regular damage on the target and restores the user's HP by half of the damage that was inflicted.
At what level does Dolliv evolve into Arboliva, and what are its primary types?
Dolliv evolves into Arboliva at level 35. Arboliva is a dual-type Grass/Normal Pokémon.
What effect does the Swift Swim ability have on a Pokémon during rain?

During rain, the Speed stat of a Pokémon with the Swift Swim ability is doubled. Additionally, whenever the Pokémon uses a special move while it is raining, the move is performed twice without consuming any additional PP.
What is the recommended course of action regarding the Pokémon move Supersonic Skystrike?
The recommended course of action is that the move be forgotten, as it is dummy data that cannot be used. Additionally, once the move has been forgotten, it cannot be remembered.
What is the primary role of Excadrill when running a Swords Dance set in competitive play?
When using Swords Dance, Excadrill functions as a dual-purpose Pokemon, acting as both a utility option for removing entry hazards with Rapid Spin and a dangerous wallbreaker and cleaner.
What move is taught by the item TM62?
TM62 is an item that teaches the move Silver Wind to a compatible Pokémon.
How should Thievul be utilized in competitive play, and what items or moves enhance its wallbreaking potential?

Thievul excels as a special wallbreaker using Choice Specs and the Stakeout ability to punish switches. Psychic is its strongest move for Fighting-types like Sawk and Gurdurr, while Burning Jealousy hits Dark-types like Skuntank. Knock Off is effective at removing Eviolite from walls like Type: Null and Clefairy, making them easier to defeat later. It performs best on offensive teams alongside physical wallbreakers and VoltTurn users that can bring it into play safely to maximize the Stakeout boost.
What is the primary effect of the Own Tempo ability?
The Own Tempo ability prevents the Pokémon from becoming confused. If a Pokémon is already confused when it acquires this ability, its confusion is immediately healed.
What happens if you try to use the move Dream Eater on a Pokémon that is not asleep?
The move Dream Eater fails if it is not used on a sleeping Pokémon.
What is the recommended moveset and item strategy for using Barraskewda competitively?

Barraskewda functions best as a wallbreaker using the Choice Band for offensive power or Heavy-Duty Boots to avoid hazard damage. Key moves include Flip Turn for pivoting, Close Combat for coverage against Water-resistant targets, and Aqua Jet to pick off weakened sweepers. Crunch is an optional move to threaten specific checks like Slowbro. A Jolly nature is recommended to maximize Speed against key targets like Cyclizar.
At what level does Bellsprout evolve into Weepinbell?
Bellsprout evolves into Weepinbell at level 21.
What is the effect of the Cotton Down ability in battle?

When a Pokémon with the Cotton Down ability is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around. This action lowers the Speed stat of all other Pokémon on the field, excluding the Pokémon with the ability itself.
What is the special effect of the move Shadow Blast?
Shadow Blast inflicts regular damage, and it has the special effect of increasing the user's critical hit rate by one level.
What move is taught by TM16, and what is its effect during battle?
TM16 teaches the move Light Screen. When used, it creates a wall of light that reduces damage taken from special attacks for five turns.
What are the specific effects of the move Snipe Shot when used in battle?

Snipe Shot inflicts regular damage and sets reflect on the user's side of the field if the move is successful. Additionally, it allows the user to ignore the effects of opposing Pokémon's moves and abilities that would otherwise draw in the move, ensuring it hits the chosen target.
What is the function of the Pass in the Pokémon games?

The Pass is a Key Item required to board the Magnet Train, which travels between Goldenrod City in Johto and Saffron City in Kanto. Once the Pass is in the player's Bag and the Machine Part has been delivered to the Power Plant, the player gains unlimited access to ride the train by interacting with the station attendant.
At what levels does Rookidee evolve into its subsequent forms?
Rookidee evolves into Corvisquire starting at level 18, and Corvisquire evolves into Corviknight starting at level 38.
What is the secondary effect of the move Pyro Ball?
Pyro Ball inflicts regular damage and has a percentage chance to burn the target.
What happens when a Pokémon holds a White Herb in battle?

When a Pokémon holds a White Herb, it will automatically consume the item at the end of a turn if any of its stat modifiers are negative. This action removes the negative modifiers and restores the stats. The White Herb is a single-use item.
What is Tyrantrum's role in the NU tier and what are its primary offensive strengths and weaknesses?

In the NU tier, Tyrantrum serves as a premier wallbreaker that deals massive damage with a STAB, recoil-free Head Smash. Its strengths include a good Speed tier and access to moves like Scale Shot for sweeping and Close Combat to hit Steel- and Ground-type switch-ins. However, it is held back by the low accuracy of Head Smash, its predictability against Steel- and Ground-type defensive cores, and vulnerability to faster revenge killers like Passimian, Rotom-C, and Inteleon.
What is the effect of holding the Decidium Z item?
The Decidium Z is a held item that allows Decidueye to upgrade its Spirit Shackle move into the Z-Move known as Sinister Arrow Raid. It is a crystallized form of Z-Power.
What is the primary role of Assault Vest Primarina and how does it handle walls like Blissey?

Assault Vest Primarina functions as a special tank and offensive threat. It uses Psychic Noise to hit Toxapex super effectively and block healing from walls like Blissey, Clodsire, and Clefable, allowing it to chip them down. Whirlpool can also be used to trap these walls to prevent them from outlasting Primarina.
How does Pupitar move while its arms and legs are developing inside its shell?

While its arms and legs are developing inside the shell, Pupitar uses compressed gas to propel itself around. This technique is powerful enough to knock down mountains, and Pupitar can even perform it while sleeping.
At what level does Mr. Mime evolve into Mr. Rime?
Mr. Mime evolves into Mr. Rime at level 42.
What is the chance that a move's user will be poisoned if they make contact with a Pokémon that has the Poison Point ability?
When a move makes contact with a Pokémon possessing the Poison Point ability, there is a 30% chance that the move's user will be poisoned.
What happens if a Pokémon uses the move Ally Switch in battle?

The user of the move teleports using a strange power and switches its position on the field with the friendly Pokémon opposite it. If the user is in the middle position during a triple battle or if there are no other friendly Pokémon available, the move will fail. Additionally, the chance of the move failing increases if it is used in succession.
What is the special effect of the move Assurance when used on a target that has already taken damage in the same turn?
